translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the body’s reaction to them can cause massive damage. Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis. In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the body’s reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels. In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva. In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: Masassako. Masassako wata cuta ce da ke dangana ga matsananciyar kamuwa da rashin lafiya wanda ke samuwa ta dalilin ta'amali da tantagaryar ruwan da ke ɗauke da wata halitta mai suna schistosome a turance da ke rayuwa cikin jini. Ana iya kamuwa da cutar ne a yayin da mutane su ka yi ta'ammuli da tantagaryar ruwan da ke ya gurɓata da ƙananan tsutsotsin da ke tsotse jini wanda aka ke kira schistosome a turance. Manyan tsutsotsin da akan iya ganin shi a na'urar ƙara ƙarfin gani na rayuwa ne a cikin jijiya wanda totse mafitar fitsari da ƴan hanji. Mafi yawan ƙwoyayen da su ke yi yana ƙargamuwa ne a tsoka sannan yanayin da jiki zai amsa na sanyawa su zama gagarumin matsala . Kusan mutane miliyan 240 ne su ka kamu da wannan cuta ta masassako a duniya, kuma sama da mutane miliyan 700 ke rayuwa a inda wannan cuta ta yi ƙamari. Kamuwa da cutar na da nasaba ne a wajajen da su ke da raɓa da maka-mantan su, a unguwanni ko guraren da ba su da wadatacce kuma ingantaccen ruwan sha da kuma tsabtar muhalli. Masassakon al'aura na samuwa ne ta dalilin masassakon cikin jini da kuma na cikin hanji, wanda ke ɗaya daga cikin jinsin halittun S. guineensis, S intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum da kuma S. mekongi. Miliyoyin mutane dayawa a duniya na fama da matsanancin rashin lafiya ta dalilin illar masassako. Hanyar da kungiyar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta kawo wajen amfani da magungunan da su ke da tasiri akan tsutsan jiki ya zama na za'a iya magance masassako a guraren da ke gama-garin guri ne, tare da kawo tallafi ko agaji game da ƙwayoyin cutar da ke haifar da rashin jin zafi ko wani alamun gane akwai cuta a jiki, cutar makanta da ake kira river blindness a turance, da kuma cututtukan da su kan iya yaɗuwa ta rairayi (ƙasa) wato helminthiasis. A guraren da su ka yi ƙamari, za'a iya samun kariya daga tsananin cutar masassako ta hanyar bada magani ga waɗanda su ke cikin barazanar kamuwa da ita idan aka yi duba da guraren da aka yi bincike wajen gane ƙarfin cutar ta hanyar mutanen wajen. Magungunan praziquentel da albendazole su aka fi bayarwa da kuma ibermectin, a wajen da ake amfani da waɗannan magunguna a mabanbanta lokuta don bada cikakken kariya ta hanyar amfani da magunguna. Alamomi: alamomin masassako na faruwa ne ta hanyar yadda yanayin jiki ke komawa ta dalilin waɗannan ƙwoyayen tsutsotsin.. Masassakon hanji na kawo ciwon mara, gudawa, da kuma jini a cikin bahaya. Girman hanta na daga cikin abubuwan da ke nuni da tasirin cutar , kuma yana da alaƙa da tara ruwa a fatar ciki da kuma yawan jinin da ke gudana a jijiyoyin mara. A irin waɗannan matsaloli akwai yiyuwar ƙarin girman sefa. Mafi gamsuwar alamar wannan cuta ta masassakon al'aura shi ne alamun jini a cikin fitsari wanda ake kira da haematuria a turance. Ƙaban mafitsara da na mahaifa, gami da lalacewar ƙoda na daga cikin abubuwan da za'a iya ganowa idan cutar ta shahara. Wani abun da za'a iya ganewa da ke da tsarkakiya shi ne ƙarin mafitsara a matakin gaba. Cutar masassakon al'aura ga mata na iya zuwa da buɗuwar matantaka, zuban jini a matantaka, jin zafi a lokutan mu'amalar aure, da kuma fitowar ƙurji akan al'aura. Cutar masassakon al'aura ga maza kan iya samar da ƙurajen mazakuta, ƙarin mazakuta da wasu sauran sassan jiki. Wannan cuta na iya jawo matsalolin da ba za'a iya magance su ba wanda ya haɗa da rashin haihuwa. Akan duba tasirin masaassaku ta fuskar tattalin arziki da lafiya kuma cutar na illatarwa fiye da yanda ya ke kisa. Cutar masassako na iya jawo cutar ƙarancin jini ga yara ƙanana, disashewa da kuma rashin koyon abu da wuri duk da akan iya shawo kan waɗannan ta hanyar magani. Magani: Praziquentel ne maganin da ake bayarwa wajen magance duk wani irin nau'i na masassako.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the target audience. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for refinement.

**Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Bayanai Na Kowane Lokaci:**

Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) cuta kwayar cuta da ke haifar da rashin lafiya na dogon lokaci. Mutane suna kamuwa da wannan cuta lokacin da su ka taba ruwan dumi mai ƙarfi, wanda ke dauke da larvae (cercariae) na ƙwayoyin jini masu cutarwa, waɗanda ake kira schistosomes. Kwayoyin matashiyar cutar da ke ƙanƙantar da jini suna rayuwa a cikin jijiyoyin jini da ke fitar da ruwan maza da ciki. Kusan dukkanin ƙwayoyin da su ke haifuwa suna tsayayya a cikin jini, kuma jikin mutum ya yi tasiri da su, wanda hakan na iya haifar da lalata mai yawa. Schistosomiasis ta shafar kusan mutane miliyan 240 a duniya, kuma mutane sama da miliyan 700 suna rayuwa a yankuna da cutar ta yi yawa. Cutar ta fi yawa a yankin tropics da sub-tropics, a cikin al'ummomin talauci da ba su da ruwan sha mai tsafta da kuma tsaftar muhimmi. Schistosomiasis na urinary (Urogenital) ana cutar da shi da Schistosoma haematobium, kuma schistosomiasis na ciki (Intestinal) ana cutar da shi da kowane ɗayan ƙwayoyin S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, da S. mekongi. Mutane miliyoyin a duniya suna fama da cuta mai tsanani a sakamakon schistosomiasis. Taimakon WHO kan amsar ƙwayoyin antihelmintic yanzu yana yasa zai yuwu a sarrafa schistosomiasis a cikin al'ummomin talauci da kuma marangulu, tare da hanyoyin hana lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis da kuma cutar da ke kasawa a cikin ƙasa (soil transmitted helminthiasis). A yankuna da cutar ta yi yawa sosai, cuta mai tsanani ta wajen schistosomiasis na iya hana ta ta hanyar magani na yawan amsa ga mutanen da ke cikin hadari, bisa ga binciken al'umma bisa ga ƙungiyoyin bincike. Praziquantel an amshi shi tare da albendazole da ivermectin, a yankuna inda aka yi amfani da waɗannan kwayoyin don hana cuta.

**Alamar cuta:**

Alamar cutar schistosomiasis ta samo asali ne daga yadda jikin mutum ke amsa ƙwayoyin cutar. Schistosomiasis na ciki na iya haifar da zubar da ruwan ciki, diarrhea, da jini a cikin ruwan ciki. Girman jikin ƙungiya (liver) ya fi yawa a cikin matsayin da ya ci gaba, kuma yawanci yana haɗuwa da tarin ruwan jiki a cikin cavity na peritoneal da kuma hypertension na jijiyoyin jini na ciki. A irin wannan yanayin, jikin ƙungiya (spleen) ma zai iya girma. Alamar gargajiya na schistosomiasis na urinary shi ne haematuria (jini a cikin ruwan maza). Fibrosis na bladder da ureter, da lalata jikin ƙungiya (kidney) an sami su a cikin matsayin da ya ci gaba. Cutar kansar bladder (bladder cancer) wataƙila ta zama cuta a matsayin na karshe. A mata, schistosomiasis na urinary na iya nuna cuta a cikin genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, zubar da ruwan jiki lokacin jima'i, da nodules a cikin vulva. A maza, schistosomiasis na urinary na iya haifar da cuta a cikin seminal vesicles, prostate, da sauran ƙungiyoyi. Wannan cuta kuma na iya zama da sauran sakamako na dogon lokaci da ba za'a sake shi ba, gami da rashin yuwuwar haihuwa (infertility). Tasirin kudi da lafiya na schistosomiasis ya kasance mai yawa, kuma cutar ta lalata fiye da yadda ta kashe. A yara, schistosomiasis na iya haifar da anaemia, stunting da kuma kawar da yuwuwar koyo, duk da cewa tasirin yawanci yana da izuwa tare da magani.

**Magani:**

Praziquantel shi ne maganin da aka ƙara amfani da shi don kowane irin cutar schistosomiasis.

---

**Notes on the Translation & Potential Refinements:**

*   **Technical Terms:** I've tried to use the most common and understandable Hausa terms for medical terminology. However, some terms might require further clarification or adaptation based on the specific audience.  For example, "peritoneal cavity" could be explained more fully.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I've adjusted sentence structure to flow naturally in Hausa.  English and Hausa have different grammatical structures, so a direct word-for-word translation would be awkward.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:**  I've aimed for language that is respectful and appropriate for a health education context.
*   **Regional Variations:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form, but some words might be preferred in certain areas.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  **Crucially, this translation *needs* to be reviewed by a fluent Hausa speaker, ideally someone with a medical background, to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.**  They can identify any nuances I may have missed and suggest improvements.
*   **"Bilharzia":** I've kept "Bilharzia" in parentheses after "Schistosomiasis" as it's a commonly used term in some areas.
*   **Specificity:** In some cases, I've added clarifying phrases (e.g., "na ciki" - intestinal, "na urinary" - urogenital) to ensure the meaning is clear.

To help me refine the translation further, could you tell me:

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries. Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.
translations.reference: Yana da matuƙar tasiri, ingantacce ne sannan kuma yana da sauƙi. Duk da ya kan iya dawowa bayan an yi magani, amma an disashar da barazanar matsananciyar kamuwa da cutar kuma ma an gusar da ita idan an fara magance ta kuma aka ci gaba da magance a lokacin yarinta. An sarrafa cutar masassako fiye da shekaru arba'in a mafiya yawan kasashe da su ka haɗa da Brazil, Cambodia, Chaina,Masar, Mauritius, Kasar Iraƙi, Oman, Jordan, Saudiya, Maroko, Tunisiya da sauransu. A Burundi, Burkina faso, Ghana, Nijar, Ruwanda, Saliyo, ƙasar Tanzania da Yaman, suna fafatutukar magance cutar masassako a matakin tarayya sannan kuma za su iya cimma wannan cutar a wasu shekaru kaɗan. Ana buƙatar lura da duba ga yanda cutar ke yaɗuwa a ƙasashe dayawa. A shekaru goma da su ka wuce, akwai ƙarin kamfen ɗin magance wannan cuta a wasu daga cikin kasashen da ke Kudu da Arewa na sahara in da mafi yawan da su ke cikin barazanar kamuwa da cutar su ke rayuwa.

Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided English document. I've aimed for accuracy and clarity, keeping in mind the target audience.  I've also included some notes after the translation explaining some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Yana aiki sosai, ya amanci, kuma yana da farashi mai rahusa. Ko da aka sake kamuwa da cuta bayan jinya, haɗarin samun cuta mai tsanani ya ragu, har ma da inuwar akinsa, idan an fara jinya a canjarashi kuma a maimaita. Kwararren kulawa da cutar Schistosomiasis ta sami nasara a kasashe da dama a cikin shekaru 40 da suka gabata, gami da Brazil, Cambodia, China, Masar, Mauritius, Jamhuriyar Musulmi ta Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudiyya, Morocco, Tunisia, da saurayi. A Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, Jamhuriyar Hadaddiyar Daular Tanzaniya, da Yemen, an samu nasarar haɓaka jinyar cutar Schistosomiasis zuwa matakin kasa baki ɗaya kuma ta yi tasiri akan cutar a cikin shekaru kaɗan. Ana buƙatar a tantance matsayin yaduwar cutar a kasashe da dama. A cikin shekaru 10 da suka gabata, an haɓaka yakin jinya a ƙasashe da yawa a Kudu da Sahal, inda mafi yawan mutanen da ke cikin haɗari suke zaune.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"It is effective, safe, and low-cost"**: I translated this as "Yana aiki sosai, ya amanci, kuma yana da farashi mai rahusa."  "Aiki sosai" means "very effective," "ya amanci" means "it is safe," and "farashi mai rahusa" means "low cost."
*   **"Re-infection"**: Translated as "sake kamuwa da cuta" (to be infected again with the disease).
*   **"Diminished and even reversed"**:  Translated as "ya ragu, har ma da inuwar akinsa" (reduced, even to the point of reversal).  The phrasing aims to capture the nuance of the original.
*   **"Schistosomiasis control"**: Translated as "Kwararren kulawa da cutar Schistosomiasis" (Effective control of Schistosomiasis). I kept "Schistosomiasis" as is, as it's a technical term often used directly in Hausa.
*   **Country Names:** I've transliterated the country names as best as possible into Hausa.
*   **"Scale-up"**: Translated as "haɓaka" which means "to improve" or "to scale up."
*   **"Sub-Saharan"**: Translated as "a Kudu da Sahal" (South of the Sahara).
*   **"Assessment of the status of transmission"**: Translated as "a tantance matsayin yaduwar cutar" (to assess the status of disease transmission).

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text.  If this document is part of a larger series or has a specific context, the translation might need further refinement.
*   **Target Audience:**  Who will be reading this?  A general audience? Healthcare professionals?  The level of technical language should be adjusted accordingly.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, a native Hausa speaker, especially one familiar with medical terminology, should review this translation for accuracy and naturalness.  This is *crucial* for ensuring the translation is both correct and understandable.
*   **Terminology Consistency:** If this is part of a larger project, establish a glossary of terms to ensure consistency across all translations.

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people – half of the world – lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care. They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care. Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting people’s right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each person’s exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the world’s population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: Tallafawa kai wajen tsaron lafiya Kula da kai wani abu ne da kowane mutune ke yi a matsayin ɗaiɗaiku, iyalai da kuma unguwanni don inganta lafiya , bada kariya daga cututtuka, ririta lafiya, da kuma juriya daga cuta ko wata nakasa da tallafin ma'aikatan lafiya ko ba taimakon su. A yanzu haka mutane biliyan 3.6 - rabin duniya - su na ƙarancin samun kula a matakin farko na ayyukan lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bada shawaran tallafawa kai da kuma tsarin tattalin arziki ga kowace ƙasa, a matsayin hanya mafi tsauri don cimma wata gamammiyar matakin samar da lafiya a duniya gabaɗaya, inganta lafiya, kuma a samar da tsaro ga duniya, sannan a tseratar da masu rauni. Kula da kai na wayar da mutane da su wakilai ma su himma wajen kula da lafiyar su, a wasu wajajen da su ka haɗa da inganta lafiya; samar da kariya daga cututtuka da kuma hanyoyin daƙile su; bawa kai magani; samar da kula ga waɗanda ba za su iya yiwa kan su ba, da kuma gyara ; da su ka haɗa da bada tallafin kula. Kula da kai abu ne da ke a zahiri, ingantattun kayan ayyuka don kula da kai. Sun haɗa da magunguna, rarrashi, binciken cutuka da kuma ilimin fasaha da za'a iya samu duka ko wani bangare a fannin ayyukan lafiya. Ya danganta da tallafin za'a iya amfani da su tare da ma'aikatan lafiya ko ba tare da su ba. Tallafi kula da kai kan iya: Samarwa ɗaiɗaikun mutane da ma al'umma wajen kula da lafiyar su da zaman lafiya. yana ƙarfafawa ƙasa wajen samuwar wadatattun kayayyakin amfani na lafiya yana inganta kula da lafiya a matakin farko sannan kuma yana taimakawa wajen cimma wajen samar da gamammiyar lafiya duka Tunkara: Tallafin da ya ke nufin mutane kai tsaye na bada gudunmuwa wajen samar da buƙatu da kuma hakkokin mutane ta hanyar tunkarar mutane da ya ta'allaƙa da hakkokin ɗan adam da kuma daidaiton jinsi. Wannan wata fuska ce da za'a samar da gamayyar lafiya da zaman lafiyan kowane mutum, dauƙar nauyin yanayin da su ke ciki, buƙatu da manufofin da ke kewaye da rayuwa, da kuma muhallin da su ke rayuwa a ciki. Kula da kai wani nauyi ne na kowane mutum da zai yi amfani da shi wajen kariya da kuma magance cututtuka da kan shi, cikin tsaro da kuma iya bada gudunmuwa ga al'umma. bai maye gurbin tsarin kula da lafiya ba amma maimakon haka yana samar da wasu ƙarin zaɓi ne da kuma nau'ikan tsarin kula da lafiya. Tallafin kula da ke a wadace, wanda kowa zai iya samu, wanda kuma ke da rangwamen farashi, aka yarda da shi da kuma inganci na daga cikin abubuwa mafi muhimmanci da ƙololuwa wajen inganta lafiya da kuma kare hakkokin mutane. Kula da kai zai ƙara inganta tsarin samar da ayyukan lafiya , samu da kuma gamayya. Wannan yana buƙatar dokoki da tsarin za su bada gudunmuwa, samar da kuɗin shiga sashin lafiya, kula da lura da ingantattun kayayyaki da kuma tallafi, sannan kuma ilimi wanda zai inganta cuɗanyar mutane, keɓancewa da kuma sirri. Lura da hakkokin ɗan adam na bada taimako wajen rage tashin-tashina, rigima, ƙyara, da tsangwama ta hanyar inganta gwazon kowane mutum wajen samar masa da ƴan lafiya, sanarwa da kuma yanke hukunci na tare da dogaro da kowa ba. Yanayin gaggawa Annobar da ta game duniya da annobar da ta shafi wani bangare a yanayin da tsarin kiwon lafiya yake halin kaka-nikayi , akwai waɗansu buƙatu da su ke zuwa bagatatan ga ɗaiɗaikun mutane da ma al'umma don ingantawa da kuka da lafiyar su. Ana buƙatar ƙirƙirarrun hanyoyin da su ka shallake tsarin kiwon lafiya da gaggawa da za su ba da: ƙiyasin mutane miliyan 274 na buƙatar agajin gaggawa da tsaro a yanzu haka , sannan kuma ɓarkewan annobar ma daga cikin abinda ya zama barazana ga duniya. a ƙalla mutane miliyan 400 ne a duniya da su ka rasa mafi buƙatuwar tsarin kiwon lafiya. 1 daya cikin 5 na mutanen duniya su na rayuwa ne a inda akwai annoba, in da ake samun ƙalubale a tsarin kiwon lafiya ta wajen bada muhimman ayyuka.

**Tsauraran Aikin Kulawa da Lafiya: Bayani**

Kulawa da lafiya na nufin ikon mutane, iyali da al'umma su haɗaɗa lafiya, hana cuta, kiyaye lafiya, da kuma kawo karshen rashin lafiya da nakasawa, da ko ba da goyon bayan ma'aikacin lafiya. A halin da ake ciki, mutane biliyan 3.6 – kashi biyu na duniya – basu da isassun ayyukan lafiya na gabaɗaya. WHO ta ƙara waɗancan ƙa'idoji na kulawa da lafiya a kowace ƙasa da kuma kowane yanayi na tattalin arziki, a matsayin hanyar da za ta kai ga kiyaye lafiyar kowa, haɓaka lafiya, kiyaye duniya lafiya, da kuma hidima da wadanda ke cikin mawuyacin hali.

Kulawa da lafiya yana girmama mutane a matsayin wakilan da ke da iko wajen kula da lafiyarsu, a fannin haɓaka lafiya; hana da kuma kawo karshen cuta; amfani da magani bisa ga kansu; ba da kulawa ga mutanen da suke ƙaƙan sama, da kuma gyara jiki, gami da kulawa ta hanyar sassauta wahala. Tsauraran aikin kulawa da lafiya na da kayan aiki da suka dogara ne akan bincike, da inganci, waɗanda ke tallafawa kulawa da lafiya. Sun haɗa da magani, shawara, bincike, da/ko fasahar dijital waɗanda za su iya samun damar gabaɗaya ko wajan wajan ayyukan lafiya na gabaɗaya. Ya danganta da aikin da ke aiki, za a iya amfani da su tare da ko ba tare da goyon bayan ma'aikacin lafiya ba.

Tsauraran aikin kulawa da lafiya na iya:
*   Haɓaka ikon mutane da al'umma don kula da lafiyarsu da kuma kiyayyar jikinsu.
*   Ƙarfafa hukumomin ƙasa ta hanyar amfani da ƙarƙashin kuɗi don lafiya.
*   Haɓaka kula da lafiya na gabaɗaya (PHC) da kuma haɓaka kiyaye lafiyar kowa (UHC).

**Hanyar Gudanarwa: Hanyar da ta Mayar da Hankali ga Mutane**

Tsauraran aikin kulawa da lafiya yana tallafawa buƙatun da haƙƙoƙin mutane ta hanyar hanyar da ta mayar da hankali ga mutane, wacce ta ƙunshi haƙƙin ɗan-adam da kuma jimaƙi. Wannan hanyar ta haɗaɗa lafiya da kuma kiyayyar jiki na kowane mutum, ta hanyar la'akantar da yanayinsu, buƙatunsu da kuma burinsu a tsawon rayuwarsu, da kuma yanayin da suke rayuwa a ciki. Kulawa da lafiya na nufin ikon mutane don hana da kuma magance cuta bisa ga kansu, a cikin yanayin wani wuri mai amincanci da kuma goyon bayan. Ba ya maye gurbin tsarin lafiya, amma zai iya ba da zabin da za su yi amfani da su don kula da lafiyarsu. Tsauraran aikin kulawa da lafiya na iya haɓaka yawan aiki na isar da hidimomin lafiya, samun damar amfani da su, da kuma yawan amfani da su. Wannan yana buƙatar dokokin da ke ba da goyon baya da kuma manufofin, kudi don lafiya, samfuran da suka cancanta da aikin, da kuma koyarwa wacce ta haɓaka kasancewa da alaka da mutane, da kuma sirri da kuma amincin bayani.

**Tambayoyin Haƙƙin Ɗan-Adam**

Haƙƙin ɗan-adam na taimakawa wajen rage karfi, tilasta, ƙarya da kuma ƙerarci ta hanyar haɓaka yadda kowane mutum ke amfani da haƙƙinsa na lafiya, bayani, da kuma yanke shawara bisa ga kansa.

**Yanayin Gaggawa**

**Cutar Kwayar Cutace da Matsalolin Bil Adama**

A yanayin da tsarin lafiya na da wuya, akwai buƙatun da ba a tabbas ba akan mutane da al'umma don kula da lafiyarsu. Ana buƙatar hanyoyin da suka fi na yau da kullun aiki a fannin lafiya, saboda:

*   Mutane biliyan 274 a halin da ake ciki suna buƙatar taimako da kariya.
*   Tawayar cuta na kasancewa barazana a duniya.
*   Mutane biliyan 400 a duniya basu da isassun ayyukan lafiya na gabaɗaya.
*   Kowane mutum mai zuwa dari biyar na duniya yanzu yana rayuwa a cikin matsala, a wacce tsarin lafiya yana da wani mataki don isar da hidimomin lafiya na gabaɗaya.

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **Terminology:** I've tried to use common and understandable Hausa terms for medical and health-related concepts.  Some terms might have multiple translations; I've chosen the ones that seem most appropriate for this context.
*   **Clarity:**  I prioritized clarity over a strictly literal translation.  Sometimes, a more idiomatic Hausa phrasing is necessary to convey the meaning effectively.
*   **Cultural Context:**  Hausa culture places a strong emphasis on community and family.  I've tried to reflect this in the translation where appropriate.
*   **"Self-care":**  The concept of "self-care" is relatively new in some Hausa communities. I've used "Kulawa da Lafiya" (Care for Health) as a general translation, but it might need further explanation in a real-world application.
*   **UHC & PHC:** I've used the acronyms UHC and PHC, as they are increasingly recognized internationally.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I've adjusted sentence structure to flow naturally in Hausa.
*   **Accuracy:** I have tried my best to ensure accuracy, but a review by a native Hausa speaker with expertise in health and translation is *highly recommended* for any critical use.

**To help me improve the translation further, could you tell me:**

*   What is the intended audience for this translation? (e.g., general public, healthcare workers, policymakers)
*   Are there any specific terms or phrases that are particularly important to get right?
*   What is the context in which this translation will be used?

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: Taimakawa kai zai samar da wasu ƙarin hanyoyi mafi cancanta ga ƙananan asibitoci ko kuma wajajen da ma'aikatan lafiya ke bada gudunmawa, a matsayin wani ɓangare na tallafawa tsarin kiwon lafiya. Wannan musamman yana nuni da abinda faru misali a lokacin annobar cutar mashaƙo, a lokacin da keɓe kai da kuma bada tazara ya yiwa mutane wahala wajen samun kula da lafiyar su kamar yadda su ka saba da kuma magunguna su, kuma ma'aikatar tsarin kiwon lafiya ta ƙasa ta damu. Kungiyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya WHO ta sanya tsarin kula da kai a matsayin mafi muhimmancin aiki a wajajen da ake horarwa kan kula da matakin farko na kiwon lafiya a abin da ya shafi binciken cutar mashaƙo.

Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a low-resource language context. I'll also include some notes after the translation explaining choices made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Matsalolin kula da kaina na iya bada dama mai amfani, aƙalla, ga ayyukan da aka saba yi a asibiti ko ta maƙasashi, a matsayin wani ɓangare na tsarin lafiya mai ka'ida. Wannan ya zama da mahimmanci, musamman a lokacin jarrabawar cuta irin ta COVID-19, inda kwarewa a gida da kaucewa juna suna sa yin amfani da ayyukan lafiya da magani ya zama ƙaƙƙarrawa, kuma tsarin lafiya na kasa ya iya lalɓewa. WHO na ƙara matsalaolin kula da kaina a matsayin ayyukan da ke da fifiko a shawarwari kan yadda za'a kiyaye ayyukan lafiya na gabaɗaya a lokacin jarrabawar COVID-19.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Matsalolin:** Mat-sa-lo-lin
*   **kula da kaina:** Ku-la da Kai-na
*   **na iya bada:** Na ee ba-da
*   **dama mai amfani:** Da-ma mai am-fu-nee
*   **ƙaƙƙarrawa:** Ka-ka-ra-wa
*   **lalɓewa:** La-l-be-wa
*   **shawarwari:** Sha-wa-ri
*   **kiyaye:** Kee-ya-ve

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **"Self-care interventions"**: I translated this as "Matsalolin kula da kaina" (Problems/Actions of taking care of oneself).  Directly translating "self-care" can be tricky. This phrasing is common and understandable in Hausa.
*   **"Valuable, additional options"**:  "dama mai amfani, aƙalla" (useful benefit, at least) conveys the idea of providing extra support.
*   **"Health facility- or health worker-based services"**:  "ayyukan da aka saba yi a asibiti ko ta maƙasashi" (services that are usually done in the hospital or by health workers) is a clear and common way to express this.
*   **"Self-isolation and physical distancing"**: "kwarewa a gida da kaucewa juna" (staying at home and avoiding each other) is a readily understood translation.
*   **"Disrupted"**: "lalɓewa" (to be corrupted/disrupted) is a suitable translation in this context.
*   **"Operational guidance"**: "shawarwari" (advice/guidance) is used.
*   **"Maintaining essential health services"**: "kIyaye ayyukan lafiya na gabaɗaya" (to maintain general health services)
*   **Word Choice:** I tried to use common, everyday Hausa words to ensure broad understanding.  More technical terms might require further explanation in a specific context.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I adjusted the sentence structure slightly to flow more naturally in Hausa.  Direct, word-for-word translations often sound awkward.
*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific audience and purpose.  If this is for a highly technical audience, some terms might need to be more precise, even if they are less common.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the body’s response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year. In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies. Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state. Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis. The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: Yanayin Sepsis Sepsis wani yanayi ne da ke barazana ga rayuwar mutum da ke tashi a lokacin da jiki ke amsa kuwwar shigar kamuwa da cuta , ya kan yi sanadiyyar sanya rauni ga ita kanta jiki da saura gaɓoɓin jiki. Mafi akasari hakan wani mataki ne na ƙarshe zuwa ga mutawa ga mafi yawan cututtuka a duniya. Ya haɗa da tsaikon aikin gaɓɓai, wanda ya ke haifar da rashin daidaiton jikin wanda ke ɗauke da cutar kuma idan ba'a gane shi da wuri ba kuma an magance shi ba ya kan iya haifar da shanyewan jiki, tsayar da ayyukan sassan gaɓoɓi da kuma mutuwa. Duk da dai babu wani ƙiyasi a duniya da za'a iya tabbatar da wahalar annobar sepsis, a wata wallafa ta kimiyya da aka yi kwanannan ta kawo rahoton cewa an samu mutane miliyan 49 da sepsis ta kama sannan kuma ta na sanadin ajalin mutane miliyan 11 a duniya kowace shekara. a tsarin zamantakewa na gurare, ana gabatar da sepsis a matsayin taɓarɓarewar magance cutar da aka sani ne wanda kuma za'a iya samun kariya daga gare ta. Hakan mafi yawanci akan samun sepsis ne a sanadiyyar cutar da aka kamu da ita a tsarin kula da lafiya, wanda yana ɗaya daga cikin mafi yawan abubuwan da aka na samu cigaba wajen isar da tsarin kula da kiwon lafiya sannan kuma ya shafi ɗaruruwan miliyoyi na majinyata a duniya kowace shekara. Idan sepsis ya auku a lokacin ciki, a yayin ko kuma bayan haihuwa, ko bayan zubar da ciki na kiran sa da sepsis da ya shafi iyaye mata. Sepsis da ya shafi jarirai sabbin haihuwa ana kiran sa da sepsis na jarirai. Duk da kasancewar yana za'a iya matuƙar kiyaye shi, sepsis na iyaye mata da na jarirai yana ci gaba da zama babban ajali ga mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai. Alamomi: Sepsis yanayi ne na gaggawa da ya ke buƙatar maida hankali nan take don kiyaye rikice-rikece na gaba ko kuma mutuwa. zai iya gabatar da wasu alamomin gargaɗi a wasu lokutan , wanɗanda wasu kan iya ɓad da kama wajen ganewa ga wasu yanayin. Kamuwa da septic kan sanya masassara, amma kuma zai iya sanya sanyin jiki , matsanancin sanyi da kuma karkara. Ta iya kasancewa akwai alamar sarƙewar numfashi ko numfashi da sauri-sauri, da kuma ƙaruwar bugun zuciya ko kuma raunin jijiya da kuma sauƙan jini. ya na iya jawo ƙarancin fitsari da kuma ɗigon shuɗi a jikin fata da kuma canjuwar lafiyar hankali. A ƙarshe ya na jawo matsanancin ciwon jiki ko rashin jin daɗi, wanda za'a iya ruɗuwa da shi da mura ko kuma gubar abinci. ga yara ƙanana, ana iya samun sepsis ta hanyar nunfashi da sauri , jijjiga, fata ta zama fayau, rashin kuzari da karsashi ko wahalar tashi ko jikin matsanancin sanyin da ba dalili. Ga yara ƴan ƙasa da shekara 5, ya kan iya jawo wahalar cin abinci, amai akai-akai ko rashin fitsari. Tsammanin sepsis da kuma gaggawan tare shi na da matuƙar muhimmanci ga gane shi da kuma binciken sa. Magancewa: Fahimtar alamomin da wuri da kuma tsara lokutan da ya kamata a magance shi na daga cikin mafi muhimman abubuwa don rage haɗari da tasirin sepsis. Gano wasu sinadaran halittu kamar su furotin na C reactive, da procalcitonin kam iya yin tasiri wajen gano yanayin cutar. Bayan gano cutar da wuri, bincike zai taimaka wajen sanin ƙwayar cutar da ta zama sila kamuwa da sepsis kuma yana da amfani don tsara hari ga sinadaran da zai magance su. Za'a ba da mafi cancantar sinadaran waraka(misali, antibayotik da antifungal) a awa ɗayan da aka gano sepsis. Jurewar magani na iya tarwatsa hanyar magance sepsis saboda an fi buƙatar zahirin magungunan antibayotik ne akai akai. Tare muran da wuri na da muhimmanci a matakin farko kuma ana buƙatar maganin vesoppressor don kiyayewa da kuma inganta gudanar jini a cikin nama.

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: Akwai manyan matakai biyu da za'a iya samun kariya daga sepsis.: kariya daga yaɗuwar ƙananan halittu da kuma kamuwa da su. kariya daga kamuwa da cutar da zai iya rikiɗewa ya zama sepsis. A cikin unguwanni da garuruwa, ana iya samun taimakon kariya daga sepsis ta hanyar amfani da ayyukan tsabtace gida da karan mai, inganta tsabtar muhalli da ruwan sha da samar da shi a wadace, samar da damar zuwa ko isa ga riga-kafi, musamman ga waɗanda su ke cikin mafi haɗarin kamuwa da cutar, da kuma abincin da ya dace wanɗanda su ka haɗa da shayar da ruwan nono ga sabbin jarirai. Kariya a ma'aikatun lafiya ya ta'allaƙa ne ga tsarin kariya daga kamuwa da shi da kuma sarrafawa, ingantaccen ayyukan tsabtace gida da kai, da lafiyayyun kayan aiki da su ke yi.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I've included explanations of some choices after the translation to justify certain phrasing.

**Hausa Translation:**

Akwai matakan biyu na gaskiya don hana sepsis: 1) Hana yaduwar kwayoyin cuta da kamuwa da cuta. 2) Hana cuta ta zama sepsis. A cikin al'umma, hana sepsis yana taimakawa ta hanyar amfani da ayyukan tsafta mai kyau, inganta tsaftar muhalli da ingancin ruwa da samunsa, samar da isassun allurai, musamman ga wadanda ke cikin hadaddiyar barazana, da kuma abinci mai kyau, gami da jinin nono ga jarirai.  Hanyoyin hana sepsis a asibiti kan dogara ne akan shirye-shiryen hana kamuwa da cuta da kula da ita (IPC), ayyukan tsafta mai kyau, da kayan aiki marasa cuta da ke aiki sosai.

**Pronunciation Guide (approximate - Hausa pronunciation can be nuanced):**

*   **Akwai:** Ah-kwah-ee
*   **matakan:** mah-tah-kahn
*   **biyu:** bee-yoo
*   **gaskiya:** gahs-kee-yah
*   **don:** don
*   **hana:** hah-nah
*   **sepsis:** sep-sis (pronounced similarly to English)
*   **Yaduwar:** yah-doo-war

*   **cuta:** coo-tah
*   **da:** dah
*   **kamuwa:** kah-moo-wah
*   **Hana:** hah-nah
*   **ta:** tah
*   **zama:** zah-mah
*   **A cikin:** ah chee-n
*   **al'umma:** al-oo-mah
*   **yana:** yah-nah
*   **taimakawa:** tah-ee-mah-kah-wah
*   **ta hanyar:** tah hahn-yah
*   **amfani:** am-fah-nee
*   **ayyukan:** ah-yoo-kahn
*   **tsafta:** tsahf-tah
*   **mai kyau:** mah kee-ow
*   **inganta:** een-gahn-tah
*   **tsaftar muhalli:** tsahf-tahr moo-hal-lee
*   **da:** dah
*   **ingancin:** een-gahn-cheen
*   **ruwa:** roo-wah
*   **da:** dah
*   **samunsa:** sah-moo-n-sah
*   **samar:** sah-mahr
*   **da:** dah
*   **isassun:** ee-sah-soon
*   **allurai:** al-roo-rye
*   **musamman:** moo-sah-mahn
*   **ga:** gah
*   **wadanda:** wah-dahn-dah
*   **ke cikin:** keh chee-n
*   **hadaddiyar:** hah-dah-dee-yar
*   **barazana:** bah-rah-zah-nah
*   **da kuma:** dah koo-mah
*   **abinci:** ah-been-chee
*   **mai kyau:** mah kee-ow
*   **gami da:** gah-mee dah
*   **jinin nono:** jee-neen no-noh
*   **ga:** gah
*   **jarirai:** jah-ree-rye
*   **Hanyoyin:** hahn-yoy-een
*   **a asibiti:** ah ah-see-bee-tee
*   **kan dogara:** kahn doh-gah-rah
*   **ne akan:** neh ah-kahn
*   **shirye-shiryen:** shee-reh-shee-ren
*   **hana:** hah-nah
*   **kamuwa da cuta:** kah-moo-wah dah coo-tah
*   **da kula da ita:** dah koo-lah dah ee-tah
*   **kayan aiki:** kah-yan ah-kee
*   **marasa cuta:** mah-rah-sah coo-tah
*   **da ke aiki:** dah keh ah-kee
*   **sosai:** soh-sigh

**Explanation of Choices:**

*   **"Sepsis"**:  I've kept "sepsis" as is, as it's a technical term and often used directly in Hausa medical contexts.
*   **"Infection Prevention and Control (IPC)"**: I translated this as "shirye-shiryen hana kamuwa da cuta da kula da ita" which means "programmes for preventing infection and taking care of it."  Using the acronym "IPC" directly might not be widely understood.
*   **"Hygiene Practices"**: Translated as "ayyukan tsafta mai kyau" (good hygiene practices).
*   **"Well-functioning equipment"**: Translated as "kayan aiki marasa cuta da ke aiki sosai" (equipment that is free of disease and works very well).
*   **Structure:** I tried to maintain a clear and logical flow, breaking down the sentences into manageable chunks for Hausa readers.
*   **Formal Language:** I used a relatively formal register, appropriate for a document about health and prevention.

**Important Notes:**

*   **Dialectal Variations:** Hausa has several dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form, but some words or phrases might be preferred in specific regions.
*   **Context is Key:**  The best translation always depends on the specific context and intended audience. If you can provide more information about where this translation will be used, I can refine it further.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  It's *highly recommended* to have this translation reviewed by a native Hausa speaker, especially someone with medical knowledge, to ensure accuracy and naturalness.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other questions or need further adjustments.

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality; knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM). Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled “Education and treatment in human sexuality” (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females. In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean “sexual activity”, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:“…a state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.” (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Lafiyar jima'i. Lafiyar jima'i ginshiƙi ne da dukkan ɗaukacin lafiyar jiki da kwanciyar hankalin kowane mutum, ma'aurata da Iyalai.ga zamantakewa da ma cigaban tattalin arziki ga garuruwa da ƙasashe. Idan aka yi duba na tsanaki ga lafiyar jima'i, yana buƙatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa na jima'i da kuma dangantar da ta shafe ta, hakan da kyakkyawan manufa wajen samun jin daɗi da nutsuwa, da kuma samun jima'i cikin natsuwa, ba tare da tursasawa ba, tsangwama ko kuma tashin-tashina. Abinda kan iya sanyawa maza da mata su samu lafiyan jima'i da kuma nutsuwa ya danganta da: yanayin fahimtar su, ƙwaƙƙwara da kuma kyakkyawan sanarwa game da jima'i da abinda da ya ƙunsa,; ilimi akan haɗarurrukan da za su iya fuskanta da kuma yanayin tasirin raunin su sakamakon yin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba.; yanayin isar su ga tsarin lafiyan jima'i a asibitoci.; Zama cikin guraren da suke karfafa kuma su ka cigaba da yaɗa ilimin lafiyan jima'i. Abubuwan da suka shafi lafiyar jima'i su na da faɗi, kuma yana kewaye da yanda ake yin jima'in da kuma fahimtar jinsi, nuna jin daɗi ko rashin jin daɗi, dangantaka/mu'amala, da kuma gamsuwa. Kuma sun haɗa da sakamako maras kyau ko kuma wasu yanayi kamar su: kamuwa da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki (HIV), cututtukan da su ke yaɗuwa ta hanyar jima'i (STIs), da kuma cututtukan da su ke kama mahaifa(RTIs). da ma waɗanda su ka ɗara waɗannan(kamar su cutar daji/sankara da kuma rashin haihuwa):; samun cikin da ba'a shirya masa ba da kuma zubar da ciki; rashin gamsuwa yayin jima'i; cin zarafin jima'i; da kuma ayyukan cutarwa (kamar su kaciyan mata FGM). Ma'anoni: Kungiyar lafiya ta duniya ta jima tana aiki akan lafiyar jima'i tun kusan 1974, a lokacin da fafatawan masana ya bada sakamakon wallafa wani rahoto mai taken" Ilimi da magani a tsarin jima'in ɗan Adam"(WHO, 1975). a farkon 2000, kungiyar Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) da WHO sun samar da wasu hamshaƙan masana don bada shawara wajen duba wasu kalmomi da kuma fahimtar zaɓin tsarin. A ƙarshen wannan ganawa shi ne ya samar da ganawar fasaha a 2002, a yayin da aka yi aiki kan samar da wasu ma'anonin kalmomi da su ka danganci lafiyar jima'i da su ke ƙasa. Tsarin halitta: tsarin halitta na nufin abubuwan da su ke nuni ga mutum a matsayin mace ko namiji. A yayin da wasu tsarin halittar ba'a iya keɓance su, don akwai waɗanda su ke da duka tsarin halittun biyu, su kan banbance mutune a matsayin mace ko namiji. A yarukan da aka fi amfani da shi, kalmar tsarin halitta na nufin "ayyukan da su ka danganci jima'i " amma ga manufa ta fasaha da ya ƙunshi tsarin jinsi da jima'i da kuma tattaunawa game da lafiyan jima'i, an fi amfani da ma'anar da ke sama. Lafiyan jima'i A yanda ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ya ke a fannin aiki,shi ne wani yanayi ne da ya shafi zahiri, motsin rai,lafiyar hankali da ma na mu'amala ta fannin jinsi , ba wai kawai rashin cututtuka ba ne , ko rashin kuzari ko rashin tabbaci. Lafiyan jima'i na buƙatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa ta musamman ga jima'i da kuma mu'amalar jima'i. da kuma samun jin daɗi da lafiyayyen mu'amalar jima'i, ba tare da matsala ba , tsangwama ko kuma jin ciwo ba. Cimma lafiyan jima'i zai samu ne idan an kiyaye hakkokin jima'i, aka girmama shi, sannan aka fansar da shi ga kowane mutum. " (WHO,2006)
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy. I'll also include some notes after the translation to explain some of the choices I made, as Hausa can have nuances that are difficult to convey perfectly without context.

**Translation (Hausa):**

**Bincike game da Lafiya Mace-Mace:** Lafiya mace-mace ta wuce lafiyar mutum daya, ta shafi ma'aurata da iyalai, kuma ta kasu karshen ci gaban zamantakewa da tattalin arzaki a al'umma da kasa baki daya.  Lafiya mace-mace, idan aka yi la'akari da kyau, tana buƙatar hanyar da ta tabbata da mutumtafiya da kuma mutumtafiya da alaƙar mace-mace, da kuma yiwuwar samun kwarewar mace-mace mai daɗi da aminći, ba tare da tozha, ƙerarrawa, ko cuta ba.  Ƙarfin maza da mata don cimma lafiyar mace-mace da kuma koshin lafiya ya dogara ne akan: samun isassun bayanai na gaskiya game da mace-mace da alaƙar mace-mace; sanin abin da za su fuskanci da kuma raunansu ga sakamakon ayyukan mace-mace mara kariya; samun damar samun kula da lafiyar mace-mace; da zama a cikin wani muhalli da ya amince da kuma haɓaka lafiyar mace-mace.  Matsalolin da ke da alaka da lafiyar mace-mace sun yi yawa, kuma sun haɗa da halin da suka fi so da kuma jinsin mutum, bayanin mace-mace, alaƙa, da daɗi.  Har ila yamma, sun haɗa da sakamakwanin tabarbancewa ko yanayi irin su: kamuwa da kwayar cutar kare (HIV), cutan da ke yaduwa ta jima'i (STIs) da cutar da ke shafar hanyoyin haihuwa (RTIs) da sakamakwanansu na tabarbancewa (kamar cutar ƙungiya da rashin yuwuwar haihuwa); ciki mara kyau da karkatar da ciki; rashin lafiyar mace-mace; cin zarafin mace-mace; da kuma ayyukan cutarwa (kamar yankan mahaima, FGM).

**Tushen Maɗaukaki:**  WHO na aiki a fannin lafiyar mace-mace tun aƙalla shekarar 1974, lokacin da taron masananan ya haɗa sakamakon bugawa rahoton fasaha mai taken “Ilimi da kula da halin mace-mace” (WHO, 1975).  An fara a shekarar 2000, Kungiyar Lafiyar Amurka ta Amurka (PAHO) da WHO suka shirya taron masananan don duba kalmomi da kuma tantance zaɓuɓɓukan shirye-shirye.  Karshen wannan taron shine Taron Masananan a shekarar 2002, inda aka ƙirƙiri tushen maɗaukaki na kalmomin da suka fi kowane dangantaka da lafiyar mace-mace.

**Mace-Mace:** Mace-mace na nuni da halayen jima'i da ke bayanin mutane a matsayin mata ko maza.  Yayinda wannan jigon halayen jima'i ba su da iyaka, saboda akwai mutane da ke da duka biyu, suna da alaka da mutane a matsayin maza da mata.  A amfani da yawan harshe, an fi amfani da kalmar mace-mace don nufin "ayokin mace-mace", amma don dalilai na fasaha a cikin mahallin tattaunawa da lafiyar mace-mace, an fi so a amshi wannan tushen.

**Lafiyar Mace-Mace:**  A cewar tushen da ke aiki a halin yanzu, lafiyar mace-mace ita ce: "...hali na jiki, zuciya, tunani da koshin lafiya dangane da mace-mace; ba wai kawai rashin cuta, rashin aiki ko rashin ƙarfi ba. Lafiyar mace-mace tana buƙatar hanyar da ta tabbata da mutumtafiya da kuma mutumtafiya da alaƙar mace-mace, da kuma yiwuwar samun kwarewar mace-mace mai daɗi da aminći, ba tare da tozha, ƙerarrawa, ko cuta ba. Don cimma da kuma koshin lafiyar mace-mace, haƙƙin mace-mace na mutane na dole a girmama, koya da kuma cimma." (WHO, 2006a)

---

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Mace-Mace"**: This is the most common and generally accepted Hausa term for "sexual health."  It literally translates to "woman-woman," but in this context, it refers to the broader concept.
*   **Word Choice for "Pleasurable"**: I used "mai daɗi" which means "enjoyable" or "pleasant."
*   **"Coercion"**: Translated as "tozha" which means "force" or "pressure."
*   **"Discrimination"**: Translated as "ƙerarrawa" which means "unfairness" or "bias."
*   **"Violence"**: Translated as "cuta" which means "harm" or "injury."
*   **"Harmful Practices"**: Translated as "ayyukan cutarwa" which means "harmful acts."
*   **FGM**: I kept the abbreviation FGM as it is increasingly recognized internationally.
*   **Technical Language**: I tried to use Hausa terms that are as precise as possible, but in some cases, I had to adapt the phrasing to ensure clarity.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity**: I've aimed for a translation that is respectful and avoids language that could be considered offensive or stigmatizing.

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Context is Key:** This translation is based on the provided text. The best translation will always depend on the specific context in which it will be used.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:** It is *highly recommended* that a native Hausa speaker with expertise in health and social issues review this translation for accuracy and cultural appropriateness.  Nuances in language can be easily missed.
*   **Target Audience:** Consider the literacy level and background of the intended audience when finalizing the translation.

translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:“…a central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.” (WHO, 2006a) Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)“The fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled. Sexual rights embrace certain human rights that are already recognized in international and regional human rights documents and other consensus documents and in national laws. Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: Rights critical to the realization of sexual health include: the rights to equality and non-discrimination the right to be free from torture or to cruel, inhumane or degrading treatment or punishment the right to privacy the rights to the highest attainable standard of health (including sexual health) and social security the right to marry and to found a family and enter into marriage with the free and full consent of the intending spouses, and to equality in and at the dissolution of marriage the right to decide the number and spacing of one's children the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: “Human rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.” (GRUSKIN, 2005)
translations.reference: Jima'i: Ba za'a iya bada ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ba, ko fahimtar sa ba tare da faɗaɗa duba ga jinsi ba, wanda ya ƙunshi muhimman ɗabi'u da kuma sakamakon da ya shafi lafiyan jima'i. Ma'anar jima'i a fagen masana shi ne" abu ne da ya keɓanci ɗan Adam tsawon rayuwar sa da ta ke kewaye da jima'i, fahimtar jinsi da kuma rawar da ya ke takawa, mu'amalartar jima'i, jin sha'awa , jin daɗi, kusanci da kuma hayayyafa. Ana samun kwarewa da kuma bayyana jima'i a cikin tunani, ƙawatawa, sha'awa , aminta, ɗabi'u, ƙimantawa, halayya, hidindimu, rawar gani da kuma mu'amala. a yayin da jima'i kan iya ɗauka duk waɗannan sigogin, na kowane daga ciki bane ake samun ƙwarewa ko kuma a bayyana shi ba. Jima'i na tasirantuwa ne da ta dalilin waɗannan abubuwa da su ka haɗa da cuɗanya ta halitta, ɗabi'u, mu'amala , tattali, siyasa, al'adun gargajiya, Shari'a, tarihi, addini da kuma ruhi" (WHO,2006) Hakkokin Jima'i: Akwai yarjejeniyar da ke yaɗuwa na cewa ba za'a cimma matsaya a lafiyan jima'i ba ko killace shi ba ba tare da girmamawa, samun tsaro da kariya na wasu hakkokin ɗan Adam. Ma'anar hakkokin Jima'i a fagen masana da aka bayyana shi ƙasa gudunmuwa ne ga cigaba da tattaunawa game da Hakkokin ɗan Adam da ya danganci lafiyan jima'i. Sanya wanzajjen hakkokin ɗan adam ga jima'i da lafiyan jima'i shi ya bada hakkokin Jima'i. Hakkokin Jima'i na bada kariya ga hakkokin mutane don su bayyana kuma su cimma mu'amalarsu su kuma ji daɗin lafiyan jima'in su, tare da duba i zuwa hakkokin wasu da kuma cikin tsarin kariya game da ƙyamata." Ƙungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO, 2006, ta sabunta a 2010)" cewa cikar lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne ga yanda aka girmama hakkokin ɗan adam da bashi kariya da kuma yadda ake cika shi. Hakkokin Jima'i ya rungume wasu daga cikin hakkokin ɗan Adam da aka riga aka san su a rubuce a kundin tsarin hakkokin ɗan na duniya da ma sassan duniya , da sauran kundin tsarin da aka yi yarjejeniya akai da sauran dokokin ƙasa. Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Matsanancin hakkokin fahimtar lafiyan jima'i sun haɗa da: Ƴancin daidaito da rashin tsangwama Ƴancin kasancewa ba tare da muzgunawa ba ko wahala, rashin tausayi ko ƙin ƙarɓar magani ko hukunci Ƴancin sirri Ƴancin samun ƙololiwar kulawa a fannin lafiya( wanda ya haɗa da lafiyan jima'i) da kuma tsaro ta fannin mu'amala. Ƴancin yin aure da samun iyali, da ma shiga cikin aure da cikakkiyar yardan da babu takura ko tursasawa ga masu niyyan auren, da kuma cikekken daidaito a ciki ko yayin raba auren. Ƴancin yanke shawara wajen ƙayyadewa da kuma tazara ga yaran. Ƴancin samun sadarwa, da ma kuma karatu. Ƴancin samun zaɓi da bayyana abu, da kuma Ƴancin samun ingantaccen magance taka ginshiƙan hakkin ɗan adam. Alhakin hidimar hakkokin ɗan adam na buƙatar duk wani mutum ya girmama hakkin sauran. Matsaloli: " Hakkokin ɗan adam ta samar da kundin tsarin dokokin aiki na ƙasa da ƙasa wanda a ciki jya ke bukatar lafiyan jima'i da na haihuwa , za kuma a yi duba i zuwa burukan mutane.." (GRUSKAN, 2005)

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individual’s lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression. Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.reference: A ƴan shekarun nan, ana cigaba da amfani da kayan aikin hakkokin ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa don bada gudunmuwa da kum cigaba da ɗaiɗaikun mutane ke riyawa da ma sauran gurare don gwamnatin ƙasa ta bada tabbacin na girmamawa, kariya da kuma cimma manufa ga hakkokin da su ka shafi lafiyar iyali da na haihuwa (Cook, et al, 2003). Ma'anoni da kuma tsarin aikace-aikacen da aka gabatar an ɗora su ne bisa tsarin hakkokin kare ɗan adam na ƙasa da ƙasa wanda aka sanya shi cikin kundi, sannan kuma ya bada damar fuskantar hakkokin da su ka zama wajibi ga tsara lafiyan jima'i. An kawo muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i kamar haka:. muhimman ra'ayoyin lafiyan jima'i A yayin da aka mishi duba na tsanaki da kuma kyakkyawan fahimta: Lafiyan jima'i ya kasance ne akan lafiyan jiki ba wai kawai rashin samuwar cuta ba. Lafiyan jima'i ya shafi girmamawa, tsaro, da kuma samun ƴanci daga tsangwama da cin zarafi. Lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaƙa ne bisa cikar wasu daga cikin hakkokin ɗan adam. Lafiyan jima'i dace da dukkan rayuwar kowa, ba wai kawai ga waɗanda su ke cikin shekarun hayayyafa ba, ga masu ƙuruciya da ma manya gabaɗaya. Ana nuna lafiyan jima'i ta hanyoyi mabanbanta da ta shafi jima'i da kuma nau'ikan nuna jima'i. Lafiyan jima'i na tasirantuwa ne ta tsantar al'adun jinsi, matsayi, tsammani da canje-canjen iko. Ana buƙatar fahimtar lafiyan jima'i a cikin yanayin tsarin zamantakewa, tattali da kuma a siyasance.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English document into Hausa, aiming for accuracy and clarity while considering the nuances of the language. I'll also include some notes after the translation to explain some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

A shekarun da suka gabata, an ƙara amfani da dokokin kasa da kasa na haƙƙin ɗan-adam don tallafawa da haɓaka ƙarin buƙatun shari'a da mutane da al'umma suka gabatar, domin gwamnatin kasa ta tabbatar da ƙima, kariya da cika haƙƙinsu na lafiya da jinsin yara (Cook et al., 2003).  Ƙa'idojin aiki da ƙungiyar shirye-shirye da ke nan an girmama su ne bisa dokokin kasa da kasa na haƙƙin ɗan-adam, kuma suna ba da hanyar haƙƙi don shirye-shirye a fannin lafiyar jinsin.  Abubuwan da suka haɗa da ƙa'idoji na lafiyar jinsin an jera a ƙasa.

**Abubuwan da suka haɗa da ƙa'idoji na lafiyar jinsin**

Lokacin da aka duba ta ne daidai da kuma ta hanyar da ta fi kyau:

Lafiyar jinsin ta shafi kyakkyawar ji, ba kawai rashin cuta ba.
Lafiyar jinsin ta ƙunshi ƙima, tsaro da 'yanci daga wariya da karfi.
Lafiyar jinsin ta dogara ne akan cika wasu haƙƙin ɗan-adam.
Lafiyar jinsin ta shafi kowane ɗan adam a rayuwarsa, ba kawai waɗanda ke shekarun jinsin ba, har ma da matasa da babba.
Lafiyar jinsin ta bayyana ta hanyar bambance-bambancen jinsin da kuma hanyoyin bayyanar jinsin.
Lafiyar jinsin ta shafi sosai ƙa'idojin jinsi, ayyukan, tsammanin da kuma tasirin da ke faruwa.
Lafiyar jinsin ta buƙatar a fahimta a cikin yanayi na al'umma, tattalin arzaki da siyasa.

---

**Notes on Translation Choices & Considerations:**

*   **"Sexual and Reproductive Health Rights":** I translated this as "haƙƙinsu na lafiya da jinsin yara." This is a common and generally accepted translation in Hausa for this concept.
*   **"Rights-based approach":** Translated as "hanyar haƙƙi." This conveys the idea of centering human rights in the programming.
*   **"Holistically and positively":**  I used "daidai da kuma ta hanyar da ta fi kyau" to capture the meaning of a holistic and positive view. It's a bit longer, but aims for clarity.
*   **"Well-being":** Translated as "kyakkyawar ji," which means "good feeling" or "well-being."
*   **"Freedom from discrimination and violence":** Translated as "‘yanci daga wariya da karfi."
*   **Gender Norms, Roles, Expectations, and Power Dynamics:** This was a complex phrase. I tried to capture the essence with "ƙa'idojin jinsi, ayyukan, tsammanin da kuma tasirin da ke faruwa."
*   **Context:** I tried to maintain a formal tone appropriate for a document discussing human rights.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:** I've been mindful of cultural sensitivities when translating terms related to sexuality.

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Terminology Consistency:**  It's crucial to establish consistent terminology for key concepts like "sexual health" and "human rights" within the Hausa language. This translation aims to contribute to that consistency.
*   **Review by Native Speakers:** This translation *should* be reviewed by native Hausa speakers, particularly those familiar with human rights terminology, to ensure accuracy and cultural appropriateness.  My translation is based on my understanding and available resources, but a human review is essential.
*   **Context of Use:** The specific context in which this translation will be used might influence some word choices.



I hope this translation is helpful! Please let me know if you have any questions or would like me to refine any part of it.

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV). They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea. Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission. Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations. Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i suna ƙara yaɗuwa ta hanyar jin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba. Wasu cututtukan ma su kan samuwa ne a lokacin ɗaukan ciki, haihuwa, da kuma sayarwa kuma ta hanyar jinin da ke ɗauke da cutar ko kuma abinda jinin ya haifar. Cututtukan su ma da matuƙar tasiri ga lafiya. Idan ba'a magance ba, ya kan iya kaiwa ga matsaloli masu girma wanda ya yaɗa da cututtukan da su ka shafi ƙwaƙwalwa da na zuciya, rashin haihuwa, cikin da ke zama a bayan mahaifa, ɓari, da kuma ƙaruwar barazana ga kamuwa da ƙwayoyin da ke hadda cutar ƙanjamau (HIV). Su na haɗe da ƙyama, cin zarafin cikin gida, kuma yana haifar da lalacewar ingantaccen lafiya. Mafi yawan waɗannan cututtuka ba su da alamun da za'a iya ganewa. Idan an kamu da su, gama-garin alamun STIs su ne zubar zuwa daga mafitsara ko mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura, da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Cututtukan da aka fi magancewa na STIs su ne trichomonas (zubar ruwa a mafitsaran mace), Chlamydia, gonoriya da sifilis. Samun ƙaruwar magungunan da ke tasiri akan ƙwayoyin cututtuka na yin barazana ga cututtukan da ba za'a gonoriya wanda ba za'a iya magance ta ba. Ƙwayoyin cutar virus da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i sun haɗa da ƙwayar cutar mai karya garkuwar jiki wato HIV, ƙwayar cutar da ke zama a matantaka mace wato HSV, Hepatitis B, HPV, da kuma Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1(HTLV-1). rashin ko samun ƙarancin magani. Ana samun riga-kafin Hepatitis B a ko ina don bada kariya ga cutar sankarar hanta, da kuma HPV don bada kariya ga sankarar mahaifa. HIV, HSV da HTLV-1 cututtuka ne da kan iya zama na tsawon rayuwa, HIV da HSV na da magungunan da za su iya disashe ƙarfin ƙwayoyin cutar, amma a yanzu haka dai babu maganin da zai iya kawar da waɗannan cututtuka. Amfani da kororon roba akan kari kuma bisa ƙa'ida kan iya bada cikekken kariya daga kamuwa da cututtukan jima'i. Yin gwaji da wuri da kuma binciken mutanen da su ke ɗauke da wannan cututtuka tare da abokan hulɗar su kan iya samar da kyakkyawan dama don samun ingantaccen magani da kuma kariya daga rikitarwa da kuma ci gaba da yaɗawa. Alamomi: Mutum zai iya kamuwa da cututtukan ba tare da ƙwaƙƙwaran wasu alamun cutar ba. Idan ya kasance akwai, gama-garin alamu cutukan sun haɗa da: zubar ruwa na ba gaira ba dalili daga matantaka, zubar ruwa daga mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura da ƙuraje da kuma ciwon ƙasan mara. Alamun cututtukan na musamman su ne: Cutar Gonoriya da Chlamydia Waɗannan cututtuka su na kama mahaifa a mata, mafitsara ga maza da kuma wasu cututtukan da su ke kama al'aura, wanda ya haɗa da cutar da ke zazzago da dubura waje. Alamomin da aka saba gani sun haɗa da zubar ruwa daga al'auran mata da na maza, jin zafi yayin yin fitsari. Jariran iyayen da su ke ɗauke da cutar za su iya kamuwa da cutar ciwon ido dalilin gamuwa da cutar yayin haihuwan da ba na tiyata ba. cutar da ke zazzago da dubura kan iya rasa alamun kamuwa da cututtuka. Sifilis: Sifilis ma yawanci baya bayyana alamu , a lokacin da alamu ya bayyana a farkon matakin sifilis zai nuna wani gyanbo ne maras zafi da ciwo. sifilis a mataki na biyu na iya bayyana a matsayin ciwo kawai wanda ke samun fata, jiki da kuma ƙulkutu ko ƙari wanda ya yaɗa da ƙuraje a tafin hannu da kuma tafin ƙafa.
