**Maganin Asali Mara Kyau da Na Adalsaba: Bayanai**

Har zuwa mutane biliyan biyu a duniya basu da isasshen damar samun magani, allurar rigakafi, kayan aikin lissafi da sauran kayan aikin lafiya, wanda ke haifar da watawarar da sau da sau a cika ta da maganin asali mara kyau da na adalsaba.  Wannan matsala na ƙaruwa ne saboda hanyoyin samar da kayayyakin duniya na zama mafi wahaka, ma'ana kayayyakin da aka samar a wata ƙasa za a kowane su a wata ƙasa ta biyu, sannan a rarraba su a kan iyakokin kasashe don sayan su ko sayar da su ga abokan ciniki a wata ƙasa ta uku.  Ƙaruwar kasuwancin lantarki (e-commerce) ma tana haɓaka wannan al'ada ta hanyar samar da sauƙi don siyan magani akan layi, galibi daga manyan hanyoyin ba bisa doka.

WHO ta gano wannan matsala a matsayin daya daga cikin matsayakin lafiya na gaggawa a shekaru goma masu zuwa, saboda fiye da ɗaya a cikin dari ɗaya na magunguna a kasashe masu ƙarancin kudi da kuma da matsakaici an kiyayyar su na da maganin asali mara kyau ko na adalsaba.  Babu wata ƙasa da ta tsira daga wannan matsala, kuma WHO ta samu rahotannin maganin asali mara kyau ko na adalsaba, allurar rigakafi da kayan aikin lissafi daga dukkan bangarorin duniya.  Duk da magungunan asali da na sabo (innovator medicines) na iya zama adalsaba, daga manyan kayayyakin da suka fi tsada don jinya har zuwa ƙananan kayayyakin don jinyan zubar da jini.

Jamusai na WHO sun amince da wata dangi ta duniya mai cikakken tsari mai mai da hankali kan hana, gano da amsa don kai ga ƙarin damar samun magani, da amincin, da tasiri da kuma ingancin magani.

**Tasiri:**

Maganin asali mara kyau da na adalsaba na haifar da matsaloli da yawa ga mai daukar maganin da kuma iyalansa, al'umma baki daya, tsarin kula da lafiya da kuma hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki.  Lokacin da magunguna ba sa aikin da ya kamata, suna iya gazawar jinyewa ko hana cuta, haɓaka jinin antimicrobial, zubar da ƙima da kuma haifar da rashin amana akan magani da kuma rashin amana akan masu ba da sabis na kula da lafiya.  Wannan na iya haɓaka tasiri mai illa a kan zamantauwa da tattalin arziki, haɓaka asarar aikin yi da ƙarin kudin da ke kasuwa ga mutane da kuma tsarin kula da lafiya na kasa.  Sune ma su fiye da yawa a kai ga marasa lafiya a yanayi da akwai kawar da damar samun magani da amincin, da rashin tsarin mulki da kuma rauwayar fasaha.  Kodayke wannan matsala ta shafar dukkan kasashe, kasashe da ke da tsarin dokokin da ba su da ƙarfi ko kuma ba su da wata matsakaicin doka su ne su fiye da yawa a ɗaukar maganin asali mara kyau da na adalsaba.

A duniya mai ƙarfi, babu wata ƙasa da ta da kusan isasshen kayan aiki da ƙarfi don warware wannan matsala ta daban.  Ta hanyar tsarin duniya da tsarin aiki irin su WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System da WHO Member State Mechanism, Jamusai na WHO suna aiki tare don hana, gano da amsa ga maganin asali mara kyau da na adalsaba.

---

**Notes on the Translation & Potential Refinements:**

*   **"Substandard and Falsified":** I've used "Maganin asali mara kyau da na adalsaba."  "Mara kyau" translates to "of poor quality" and "adalsaba" is a direct borrowing from the English "falsified" and is becoming increasingly common in Hausa discussions of this topic.
*   **"In vitro diagnostics":**  Translated as "kayan aikin lissafi." This is a standard term in Hausa for medical diagnostics.
*   **"Innovator medicines":** Translated as "magungunan asali da na sabo."
*   **Clarity and Flow:** I've tried to structure the sentences in a way that feels natural in Hausa.  However, some sentences might still benefit from further refinement to improve readability.
*   **Technical Terms:**  I've used standard Hausa terms for medical and technical vocabulary where possible.  However, some terms might require further consultation with a Hausa medical professional to ensure the most accurate translation.
*   **Cultural Context:**  The translation aims to be neutral and respectful of cultural norms.
*   **Review:** It is highly recommended that a native Hausa speaker, preferably with a background in medicine or public health, review this translation for accuracy and clarity.

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15–29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries. Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies. Suicide: facts and figures globally Suicide worldwide in 2019 report LIVE LIFE: an implementation guide for suicide prevention in countries Prevention: Much can be done at individual, community and national levels to prevent suicide and suicide attempts. WHO’s LIVE LIFE approach recommends four effective, evidence-based key interventions which should be included in every national response to suicide: limit access to the means of suicide interact with the media for responsible reporting of suicide foster socio-emotional life skills in adolescents early identify, assess, manage and follow up anyone who is affected by suicidal behaviours. The foundational pillars of the interventions are situation analysis, multisectoral collaboration, awareness raising, capacity building, financing, surveillance, monitoring and evaluation. Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: Magance ƙunar-baƙin-wake/ksan-kai Sharhi: Fiye da mutane 700 000 ne suke rasa rayukansu a kowace shekara a sanadiyyar ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai. Bisa faruwar kowane ƙunar-baƙin-wake, akwai hasashen yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake fiye da 20. ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai kan iya aukuwa a kowane mataki na rayuwa, sannan kuma a kowane ɓangare na duniya. A 2019, ƙunar-baƙin-wake shi ne na huɗu a cikin abubuwan da suke haifar da mutuwa a tsakanin 'yan shekara 15-29 a duniya da kuma kaso 77% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisan-kai na faruwa ne a tsakanin ƙasashe masu mafi qaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga. Kimanin kaso 20% na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a duniya, na faruwa ne sakamakon shan guba bisa ra'in ƙashi-kai. A yayin da aka tabbatar da danganata ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai da yanayin matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa (Musamman damuwa da shan barasa ba tare da ƙaƙƙautawa ba) da kuma yunƙurin yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake/kisank-kai a baya a ƙasashen da yawan kuɗin shiga, inda yawan yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ke faruwa a lokacin rigingimu. Abubuwan da ke haifar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai sun haɗa da karaya da damuwa da nuna bambanci da rabuwar wata alaƙa da matsalar kuɗi da matsanancin ciwo da cuta da keta haddi da rigingimu da sauran abubuwa da suka shafi keta haddin ɗan'adam. Matsalar yanayin hauka da na ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai shi ne mutane suna yin tunanin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ba neman taimako ba. ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai ko ƙoƙarin yin hakan yana da mummunan tasiri a kan iyalai da abokai da abokan aiki da al'umma gaba ɗaya. ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai: Adadin faruwarsa a duniya Rahoton faruwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a 2019 a duniya Gwagwarmayar Rayuwa: jagora wajen kawar da yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a ƙasashe Kawarwa: Akwai matakai da dama da za a iya ɗauka a matakin ɗaiɗaikun mutane da al'umma da kuma matakin ƙasa wajen kawar da aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai da kuma yunƙurin yin hakan. Hanyoyin da Hukumar Lafiya ta bayar ya kamata a yi amfani da su wajen yin maganin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a matakin kowace ƙasa, wanda ya haɗa da: hana kaiwa ga hanyoyin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai mu'amala da kafafen sadarwa domin bayar da cikakken rahoto game da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai koyar da dabarun jure damuwa ga matasa saurin ganowa da kimantawa da kulawa da kuma bibiyar duk wanda yake da ɗabi'un yin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai . Abu muhimmi wajen daƙile wannan ta'ada shi ne bincike da haɗin gwiwar ɓangarori daban-daban da wayar da kai da bayar da horo da sa-ido a kan hada-hadar kuɗi da kulawa da kuma kimantawa. Yunƙurin kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai na buƙatar haɗin-kai da haɗin gwiwa a tsakanin ɓangarori, waɗanda suka haɗa da ɓangaren lafiya da ilimi da ƙwadago da noma da kasuwanci da shari'a da doka da tsaro da siyasa da kuma kafafen watsa labarai. Ba kasafai ake kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai yadda ya kamata ba saboda damuwa da rashin wayar da kai, wanda shi ne babban ƙalubalen ɓangaren lafiya. Su ma al'ummomi suna da rawar da za su taka wajen kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai. Bayanan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yi wa al'ummomi jagoranci sun bayyana yadda al'ummomi za su gano abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci wajen aiwatar da aiwatar da su bisa ga kowace al'umma. Bayanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: An ba wa ƙoƙarin gaggauta kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai matuƙar fifiko.

Kasancewa da adadi na iya faruwa a kowace mataki na rayuwa kuma a duk yankin duniya. Wasu abubuwan da ke haifar da kasancewa da adadi sun haɗa da faduwarsa, ɓacewar, ƙiyayya, ƙarshen al'umma, matsalolin kuɗi, ciwon jiki da cuta, karfi, zalunci, da rikici ko sauran harkokin jin kai. translations.source: The reduction of suicide rates in countries is an indicator in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (the only indicator for mental health), WHO’s General Programme of Work and WHO’s Comprehensive Mental Health Action Plan 2013–2030. The first WHO world suicide report, Preventing suicide: a global imperative, published in 2014, aimed to increase awareness of the public health significance of suicide and suicide attempts and make suicide prevention a public health priority. Governments are encouraged to implement WHO’s LIVE LIFE package of effective and evidence-based key interventions for suicide prevention, and to develop or strengthen comprehensive national suicide prevention strategies in a multisectoral public health approach. National leadership and coordination on suicide prevention are further supported by the publication of National suicide prevention strategies: progress, examples and indicators. Recognizing that data and statistics are necessary for advocacy and decision-making, WHO published Suicide worldwide in 2019: Global Health Estimates. WHO’s vision is a world where death by suicide is no longer a leading cause of death and where people who are attempting or thinking about suicide feel comfortable seeking help which is provided capably and respectfully to all.
translations.reference: Raguwar yawan aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kisan-kai a ƙasashe alama ce ta ayyukan Hukumar Ci-gaba ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya (alama ce kawai a ɓabgaren lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa) da Shirye-shiryen Ayyuka na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da kuma Shirin Samar da Wadatacciyar Lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa na 2013-2030. Rahoton Hukmar Lafiya ta Duniya a kan ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na farko ya nuna cewa, kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai: rahoton da aka buga a 2014 da manufar ƙara wayar da kai a kan muhimmancin inganta lafiyar al'umma wajen daƙile aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ko kuma yunƙurin yin hakan da kuma da ba wa kawar da aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai fifiko tamkar na kula da lafiyar al'umma. An ƙarfafar gwiyoyin gwamnatoci da su aiwatar da shirin Hukumar Lafiya na Rayuwa yadda ya kamata ta hanyar ɗaukar matakan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai da kuma samar da dabarun kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai na ƙasa, ta hanyar dabarun kula da lafiya daban-daban. Ana ƙarfafar shugabannni da masu sa-ido a kan kawar da ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ta hanyar buga rahotanni game da dabarun daƙile ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai, ta hanyar bayyana ci-gaban da aka samu da misalai da kuma alamomi. Sakamakon gamsuwa da muhimmancin da ke tattare da da bayanai da ƙididdiga wajen yanke shawara,Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta buga rahoto aukuwar ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai a duniya a 2019: Hashen Lafiya na Duniya. Manufar Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ita ce, ya kasance ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai ba ya cikin abubuwan da suke sabbaba mutuwa a duniya, sannan kuma da tallafa wa waɗanda suka yi yunƙurin ƙunar-baƙin-wake ko kashe-kai.

**Hausa Translation:**

Matsayin raguwar kaso kasashen duniya daga cutar kashe kaina ya nuna ci gaba a cikin burin ci gaban kabilcin duniya na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (wani kadan ne a cikin burin ci gaban lafiya), aiki na kungiyar WHO, da kuma shirin aiwatar da lafiyar zuciya na WHO 2013-2030. Rahoton duniya na WHO na farko kan kashe kaina, "Kawo karshen kashe kaina: buƙatar duniya," da aka buga a shekarar 2014, ya yi niyya don ƙara wayar da kan jama'a game da muhimmin matsayin kashe kaina da ƙoƙarin kashe kaina a matsayin matsala ta lafiya kuma ya sa kashe kaina zama babban burin lafiya. Ana ƙarfafa gwamnati da su aiwatar da kunshin WHO na LIVE LIFE wanda ya ƙunshi hanyoyin da suka fi tasiri da kuma abubuwan da aka tabbatar da su don hana kashe kaina, da kuma ƙirƙirar ko ƙarfafa ƙa'idodi na ƙasa don hana kashe kaina ta hanyar amfani da hanyoyin lafiya da suka shafi dukkanin bangarori. Jagorancin kasa da daidaita ayyukan hana kashe kaina an kara tallafawa ta hanyar bugawa na "Dabarun hana kashe kaina na kasa: ci gaba, misali da alamar." Tuni mun gano cewa bayanai da ƙidayar suna buƙatar neman goyon baya da yanke shawara, WHO ta buga "Kashe kaina a duniya a shekarar 2019: Kimantawar Lafiya ta Duniya." Hankalin WHO shi ne duniya ce ta zama ta yau da kullun, mutuwa ta kashe kaina ba zata zama babban abin da ke haifar da mutuwa ba, kuma mutanen da ke ƙoƙarin kashe kaina ko tunanin kashe kaina suna jin daɗi don neman taimako wanda ke aiki yadda ya kamata da kuma da mutunci ga kowa.

*   **"Advocacy and decision-making"**: Translated as "neman goyon baya da yanke shawara" - "seeking support and making decisions."
*   **"Capable and respectfully"**: Translated as "yadda ya kamata da kuma da mutunci" - "as it should be and with dignity."
*   **Word Choice:** I tried to use vocabulary that is commonly understood and used in health-related discussions in Hausa.

translations.source: Sustainable development Overview: Sustainable development is a broad term to describe policies, projects and investments that provide benefits today without sacrificing environmental, social and personal health in the future. These policies are often described as green because they focus on limiting the impact of development on the environment. However, the benefits of sustainable development are also felt across a wide cross section of human health and well-being, including reductions in pollution- and environment-related disease, improved health outcomes and decreased stress. As the threats of climate change become increasingly important, win-win strategies for mitigation, health improvement and cost savings offer a range of advantages for various stakeholders. For example, greener health care operations can generate patient and worker health benefits while also saving energy, mitigating climate risks and creating long-term cost savings. The World Health Organization is committed to pursuing sustainable development in all its work to help protect the people of tomorrow from the health growing health risks of today. Impact: Many sustainable development strategies can offer significant wins for health, climate and the environment, and the benefits can be seen almost immediately. For example, many health and development goals can be achieved simultaneously by tackling air pollution, which is responsible for an estimated 7 million premature deaths annually. Polluting emissions include powerful short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—particularly black carbon, ozone and methane—which are very harmful to health but have only brief atmospheric lifetimes. Transport policies and investments that favour clean public transport, along with walking and cycling, can have a dramatic impact on air quality. This can reduce multiple health risks at the same time, including stroke, heart attack, lung disease and some cancers. They can also reduce the estimated 1.25 million deaths annually from traffic injury, while also improving access to health services, particularly in densely populated areas. Sustainable development housing policies can further reduce emissions through considerations such as building siting and land use, choices of construction materials, design features and ventilation and energy. WHO response: WHO’s work is guided by the Sustainable Development Goals, particularly Goal 3: “Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.” The Goals inform projects and policies across the Organization, including guidelines on housing, urban development, transportation systems and health care delivery. For example, the WHO Housing and health guidelines, first published in 2018, highlight the increasing impact of housing conditions on human health in light of urban growth, climate and demographic changes. The guidelines provide Member States, partners and the public with evidence-based recommendations relevant to inadequate living space (crowding), low and high indoor temperatures, injury hazards in the home, and accessibility of housing for people with functional impairments. The Urban Health Initiative (UHI) also focuses on ways for cities to enable good health by catalysing effective action on urban air pollution and short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)—saving lives by linking health, environment and sustainable development. WHO also collaborates with the Climate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) on the Breathe Life campaign, which aims to cut air pollution and reduce the 7 million premature deaths annually that it causes.
translations.reference: Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa ƙarin bayani: Ci-gaba mai ɗorewa kalmomin fannu ne da ke bayyana dokoki da shirue-shirye da saka hannun jari da zai kai ga samun riba a yanzu ba tare da baddala muhalli ko tsarin zamantakewa ko lafiya a nan gaba ba. Ana bayyana waɗannan dokoki da koraye, saboda suna mayar da hankali ne wajen taƙaita tasirin ci-gaba a kan muhalli. Sai dai an amfana da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa a ko'ina a duniya, wanda ya haɗa da kowane ɓangare na lafiya da jin daɗin ɗan'adam, kama daga raguwar yawan gurɓatar yanayi da cututtuka masu nasaba da muhalli da ingantuwar lafiyar da raguwar wahalhalu. A yayin da barazanar sauyawar yanayi ke da muhimmanci, dabarun samun nasara ta kowane ɓangare wajen magancewa da inganta lafiya da rage kashe kuɗi na da matuƙar muhimmanci ga masu ruwa da tsaki. Alal misali, Shirin Lafiya na 'greener health care operations' zai samar da alfanu ga mara lafiya da ma'aikatan lafiya, da kuma rage amfani da makamashi, wanda shi kuma sauƙaƙa barazanar sauyin yanayi da kuma da kuma rage kashe kuɗi na tsawon lokaci. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta ƙudiri aniyar tabbatar da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa a duk wasu ayyuka da take aiwatarwa, domin taimakawa wajen kare mutane masu zuwa nan gaba daga barazanar lafiya da ake fuskanta a yanzu. Tasiri: Da dama daga cikin dabarun shirin ci-gaba mai ɗorewa za su matuƙar taimakawa wajen samuwar lafiya da sauyin yanayi da muhalli, sannan kuma za a ga kusan alfaninsu nan take. Alal misali, za a iya cim ma nasarar da dama daga cikin manufofin lafiya da na ci-gaba a lokaci guda, ta hanyar shawo kan matsalar gurɓatar iska, wadda ita ta yi silar kimanin mace-mace milyan 7 duk shekara. Abubuwan da suke cikin gurɓatacciyar iska sun haɗa da abubuwa masu ƙarfi da ka iya ɗumama yanayi, musamman ma kabon da ozon da kuma mesan, waɗanda suke cutar da lafiya, amma kuma ba su fiye daɗewa ba. Dokokin sufuri da zuba hannun jarin da ka iya tsaftace hanyoyin sufurin jama'a da kuma tafiyar ƙasa da tuƙa keke na da matuƙar tasiri a kan ingancin iska. Wannan zai taƙaita barazana iri-iri ga lafiya, wanda ya haɗa da shayenwar ɓarin jiki da ciwon zuciya da cututtukan hunhu da kuma kansa. Haka kuma za su iya rage kimanin mace-mace miliyan 1.25 sanadiyyar samun rauni a duk shekara, yayin da kuma za su inganta kaiwa ga kula da lafiya, musamman a wuraren da suke da yawan jama'a. Dokokin Shirin Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa na samar da gidaje zai ƙara rage ƙura ta hanyar gine-gine da amfani da filaye da zaɓar kayan gini da tsari da kuma samar da gine-gine na yalwar iska da kuma makamashi. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Aikace-aikacen Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na tafiya ne bisa manufar Shirin Ci-gaba Mai Ɗorewa, musamman ma manufar ta 3: '' Tabbatar da lafiyar mutane da ƙaruwar walwalar kowa da kowa''. Manufofin na shelanta shiye-shirye da dokoki a hukumar, waɗanda suka haɗa da dokokin gina gidaje da gina birane da tsarin sufuri da samar da kulawa da lafiya. Alal misali, dokokin gina gidaje da kula lafiya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da aka fara bugawa a 2018, sun yi ƙarin haske a kan ƙaruwar tasirin yanayin gidaje a kan lafiyar mutum a yayin da birane suka bunƙasa, inda sauyin yanayi da yawan jama'a ke sauyawa. Dokokin sun ba wa mambobin ƙasashe da abokan hulɗa da sauran jama'a shawarwari da ke da nasaba da cunkoso da haɗarin cikin gida da kuma samar da gidaje ga mutanen da ke da tawaya. Shi ma Shirin Lafiya a Birane ya mayar da hanakali ne wajen samar da cikakkiyar lafiya a birane, ta hanyar gaggauta ɗaukar matakai a kan guɓacewar iska a birane da kuma abubuwan da ke haifar da ɗumamar yanayi, domin ceto rayuka masu matsalar lafiya da muhalli da ci-gaba mai ɗorewa. Haka kuma Hukumar Lafiya ta yi haɗin gwiwa da Gamayyar ƙungiyar Kula da Sauyin Yanayi da Iska Mai kyau wajen wayar da kai a kan sheƙar numfashi domin rayuwa, wanda manufarsa ita ce kawo ƙarshen gurɓacewar iska da rage mace-macen mutane miliyan 7 da ke haifarwa a duk shekara.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided document into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the nuances of the language. I'll also include some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for further refinement.

**Tabbas na Ci Gaba: Bayan Fage**

Tabbas na ci gaba (Sustainable Development) na izuwa a matsayin alkawari mai karfi don bayyana manufofin, ayyukan da saka jari domin amfanar yau ba tare da barin lafiyar muhalli, zamantakewa da mutane a gaba ba. Kusan kowane irin manufa da aka yi ta hanyar tabbas na ci gaba ana kiranta da "mai dacewa da muhalli" saboda ta nuna rawar kare muhalli daga tasirin ci gaba. Duk da haka, amfanar tabbas na ci gaba ta shafi lafiya da kuma karkataccen al'umma, ta hanyar rage cutar da ta haifar da cutar da ta shafi muhalli, inganta kwarewar lafiya da rage damuwa. Yayin da barazbanin canjin yanayi ke karɓuwa, hanyoyin da suka haɗu don kawar da barazbanai, inganta lafiya da adana kudin da za a kashe suna da fa'idodi da yawa ga dukkanin jeri. Alalokacin da aikin kula da lafiya ya zama mai dacewa da muhalli, yana haɓaka lafiya da kuma amfanar ma'aikata, yana adana makoma, kawar da barazanai da kuma samar da adana kudi a dogon lokaci.

Hukumar Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta himmatu wajen aiwatar da tabbas na ci gaba a dukkanin aikin da ta yi don kare lafiyar mutane a gaba daga barazanai da ke haɓaka a yau.

**Tasiri:**

Tabbas na ci gaba da yawa na iya kawo babban amfanar lafiya, yanayi da muhalli, kuma amfanar za a iya gani kusan nan da nan. Alalokacin da kusan kowane burin lafiya da ci gaba na iya aiki tare ta hanyar kawar da cutar da ta haifar da iska, wacce ta haifar da kusan mutuwar mutane miliyan bakwai a kowace shekara. Isar da iska ta haɗa da barazanai na yanayi da ke kasawa (SLCPs) - musamman launin fari, ozone da methane - waɗanda ke cutar da lafiya sosai, amma suna da lokaci mai kaɗan a cikin iska.

Manufofin da saka jari a cikin jigilar abubuwa da ke daidaita jigilar jama'a, da tafiya da kuma hawan keke, na iya haɓaka ingancin iska. Wannan na iya rage barazanai da yawa a lokaci guda, gami da cutar da ta shafi jini, cutar zuciya, cutar da ta shafi iska da wasu cutar da ke shafar jiki. Hakanan na iya rage karshen mutuwar mutane miliyan 1.25 a kowace shekara daga raunin tuki, yayin da hakan ke haɓaka samun lafiya, musamman a cikin biranen da yawa.

Manufofin gida na tabbas na ci gaba na iya rage fitar da iska ta hanyar la'akari da abubuwan da ke yiwuwa, kamar yadda aka kafa gida da amfani da kasa, zaɓuɓɓukan kayan gina, ƙirar gida da isar da iska da makoma.

**Amma WHO:**

Aikin WHO ya bi daidai da Burin Ci Gaba na Kula da Lafiya (SDGs), musamman Burin 3: "Kafa lafiya mai kyau da kuma haɓaka karkataccen lafiya ga dukkanin mutane dukansu shekaru." Burin ya shafi ayyukan da manufofin da ke cikin kungiyar, gami da umurnin gida, ci gaban birane, tsarin jigilar abubuwa da kuma samar da lafiya. Alalokacin da umurnin gida da lafiya, da aka buga a 2018, ya nuna yawan tasirin yanayin gida akan lafiyar mutane dangane da girman biranen, canjin yanayi da canjin yawan jama'a. Umurnin ya ba da shawarwari da suka dace da jihar, abokan tarayya da kuma jama'a dangane da matsayin zama mara kyau (cunkuso), matakan zafi da sanyi a gida, haɗin gwiwar gida da kuma samun damar gida ga mutanen da ke da matsaloli.

Ƙungiyar Lafiyar Birane (UHI) ta kuma mai da hankali kan hanyoyin da biranen keɓance lafiya ta hanyar aiwatar da aikin da ya fi kyau akan cutar da ta haifar da iska da barazanai na yanayi da ke kasawa (SLCPs) - adana rayuka ta hanyar haɗa lafiya, muhalli da tabbas na ci gaba.

WHO kuma ta haɗu da Kungiyar Tsarkakawar Iska da Taimakawa (CCAC) akan yakin "Breathe Life", wacce ke da niyyar kawar da cutar da ta haifar da iska da kuma rage karshen mutuwar mutane miliyan bakwai a kowace shekara.

---

**Notes on the Translation & Potential Refinements:**

*   **Sentence Structure:** I've adjusted sentence structure to flow naturally in Hausa. English and Hausa have different grammatical structures, so a literal translation would be awkward.
*   **Cultural Context:**  I've considered the cultural context to ensure the translation is appropriate and respectful.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  **Crucially, this translation *needs* to be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker, preferably someone familiar with development and environmental terminology.**  They can identify any inaccuracies, awkward phrasing, or areas where the language could be improved for clarity and impact.
*   **Specific Terms:** Some terms like "win-win strategies" are complex and might require further explanation or rephrasing to be fully understood by a Hausa-speaking audience.

translations.source: Syphilis Overview: Syphilis is a bacterial sexually transmitted infection (STI) caused by Treponema pallidum which results in substantial morbidity and mortality, and it is curable. Syphilis is transmitted through sexual contact with the infectious lesions, via blood transfusion or from a pregnant woman to her fetus. Mother-to-child transmission of syphilis is usually devastating to the fetus in cases that were not detected or treated sufficiently early in pregnancy. Maternal syphilis, when untreated, treated late or not treated with penicillin, results in adverse birth outcomes (ABOs) estimated in 50−80% of cases, depending on the stage of syphilis. These ABOs are often severe and include stillbirth (most commonly), neonatal death, prematurity, low birth weight, and congenitally infected infants. Syphilis can be prevented through safer sex practices including the correct and consistent use of condoms. Many people with syphilis do not have any symptoms or have only minor symptoms that go unnoticed. Identifying infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes including congenital syphilis. Screening can be done using rapid tests that can provide results in less than 20 minutes, allowing for immediate treatment. When untreated, syphilis lasts many years and goes through different stages. Treatment for syphilis is done with injectable penicillin benzathine, with 1 to 3 doses depending on the stage of the disease. Only penicillin can prevent congenital syphilis. Treatment with penicillin has been hampered by periodic and prolonged shortages of benzathine penicillin in numerous countries, including high-, low- and middle-income countries. Symptoms: Many people with syphilis do not present symptoms or do not perceive them. Untreated, syphilis lasts many years and is characterized into different stages. Sexual transmission typically occurs during early stages, i.e., up to 2 years after infection. During the initial phase (primary syphilis), which lasts on average 21 days, a solitary, painless, usually hard and round sore (chancre) appears at the site of inoculation (contact), often in the vagina, penis or anus (but it may also be extra-genital) and may go unnoticed. The chancre heals with or without treatment within 3 to 10 weeks. If untreated, the disease progresses to the secondary stage. Secondary syphilis is characterized by a rash that can vary widely and mimic other infectious or non-infectious conditions, but characteristically affects the palms and soles. The rash is non-itchy and can be minimal enough to be overlooked. In warm and moist areas of the body, such as the anus and labia, large white or grey raised lesions may develop at the location of the primary chancre (condyloma lata). The symptoms and signs of secondary syphilis spontaneously resolve, even without treatment. Without treatment, the latent stage starts.
translations.reference: Tinjere ƙarin bayani: Tinjere cuta ce da ake ɗauka yayin saduwar namiji da mace sakamakon ƙwayar cuta, wadda ke haifar da rashin lafiya da kuma mutuwa, amma ana iya warkewa. Tinjere cuta ce da ke yaxuwa a yayin jima'i, inda ake ɗaukar cuta kuma take yaɗuwa ko dai ta hanyar jin ko kuma daga uwa mai ciki zuwa jaririn da ke cikinta. Yaɗuwar cutar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri yawanci yana kassara jaririn, musamman idan ba a gano ba ko kuma an ɗauki mataki a farkon juna-biyun. Idan ba a yi maganin yaɗuwar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri ko ba a yi magani da wuri ba ko ma ba a yi maganinta da fenisilin, tana haifar da matsala yayin haihuwa da kimanin kaso 50-80, ya danganta da matakin cutar ta tinjere. Wannan sakamako yawanci yakan tsananta, sannan kuma ya haɗa da jariran da ke mutuwa yayin haihuwa (wanda ya fi yawa) da mutuwa bayan haihuwa da kafin balaga da rashin nauyin jariri da kuma jariran da suka ɗauki cuta daga uwa. Za a iya maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin taka-tsantsan wajen yin jima'i, wanda ya haɗa da yawan yin amfani da kwaroron roba. Mutane da dama da suka kamu da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamu. Tabbatar da cuta ta hanyar yin gwaji da kuma yin magana zai hana yaɗuwarta da kuma haifar da matsala a yayin haihuwa, wanda ya haɗa da nau'in tinjere da jariri ke ɗauka daga uwa. Za a iya tabbatarwa ta hanyar yawaita yin gwaje-gwaje da za su bayar da sakamako a ƙasa da minti 20, domin yin magani nan take. Ida ba a ɗauKi mataki, tinjere kan ɗauki shekaru a jikin mutum, ta hanyar kaiwa matakai daban-daban. Ana maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin allurar fenicilin sau 1 zuwa 3, ya danganta da matakin cutar. Fenicilin ne kawai yake maganin tinjeren da ake ɗauka daga uwa zuwa yaro. Yin magani da fenicilin ya samu tsaiko sakamakon rashin fenicilin benzatayin na tsawon lokaci a ƙasashe da dama, waɗanda suka haɗa da ƙasashe masu yawa da ƙaranci da matsakaicin kuɗin shiga. Alamomi: Mutane da dama da ke fama da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamomi. Cutar tinjeren da ba yi mata magani ba takan ɗauki shekaru a jikin mutum, inda take xaukar matakai daban-daban. Cutar tana yaxuwa ta hanyar jima'i a mataki farko, wato kusan shekar 2 bayan kawuwa da cutar. A matakin farko, wanda yake ɗaukar kwana 21, inda ita kaɗai kuma mara zafi, wurin kan kawashe yawanci a farji ko zakari ko kuma takashi (ko kuma gaba ɗaya), sannan kuma za a iya kasa gane ta. Ciwon ka iya warkewa ba tare da magani ba a cikin mako 2 zuwa 10. Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar kan ƙara gaba zuwa wani mataki. Cutar tinjere nau'i na biyu na siffantauwa ne da fitowar ƙuraje, waɗanda suka bambanta, sannan su haifar da cututtuka masu yaɗuwa ko marasa yaɗuwa, amma yawanci suna shafar tafin hannu da na ƙafa. ƙurajen ba masu ƙaƙayi ba ne, inda za a iya watsi da su. A sassan jikin da suke da lema ko danshi kamar takashi da leɓe, wani farin abu ko ruwan ƙasa kan fito a wurin da ciwon asali yake. Alamomin nau'in tinjere na biyu kan iya ɓacewa, ba tare da magani ba. Idan ba a ɗauki mataki ba, yanayin iya ci gaba.

Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a public health context. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for further refinement.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Bincike game da Cutar Syphilis:** Cutar Syphilis wata cuta ce da ke yaduwa ta hanyar jima'i (STI) ta kwayoyin cuta na *Treponema pallidum*.  Cutar nan na iya zama mai illa kuma na iya zubar da rayuwar mutane, amma tana da magani. Cutar Syphilis ta yadu ta hanyar samun tuntuɓar jima'i da ƙuraƙuraɓe masu cuta, ta hanyar jinin da aka buga, ko kuma daga mace mai junaɓu zuwa ga jarinta. Yaduwar cutar Syphilis daga mahaifa zuwa ga jariri yawanci na iya zubar da rayuwar jariri idan ba a gano ba ko ba a yi magani ba a farkon lokaci.  Cutar Syphilis a mata da ke junaɓu, idan ba a yi magani ba, an yi magani ne a karshe, ko kuma ba a yi magani da penicillin, na iya haɓaka abubuwan da suka fiye da yawa a lokacin haihuwa (ABOs) a kusan kashi 50-80 na al'amura, ya dangana da matakin cutar. Waɗannan ABOs yawanci suna da tsanani kuma sun haɗa da mutuwar yara a ciki (mafi yawa), mutuwar yara bayan haihuwa, haihuwa ta wuri, ƙarancin nauyin jikin yaro, da jarunan da suka kamu da cuta a haihuwa.  Za'a iya hana cutar Syphilis ta hanyar amsar hanyoyin jima'i na tsaka da amsar kondom yadda ya kamata da kuma daidai. Mutane da yawa da ke da cutar Syphilis ba sa bayyana alamun cuta ko kuma suna da alamun ƙanƙanta waɗanda ba a lura da su.  Gano cutar ta hanyar gwajin dangi da kuma maganin mutanen da suka gano cutar zai hana yaduwar cuta da kuma abubuwan da suka fiye da yawa a lokacin haihuwa, gami da cutar da ta haihu. Za'a iya aiwatar da binciken ta hanyar gwajai masu sauri waɗanda ke ba da sakamakon kusan cikin minti 20, waɗanda ke ba da izinin magani nan da nan.  Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar Syphilis na iya zama shekaru da yawa kuma ta wuce ta matsayin daban-daban. Magani don cutar Syphilis an yi ta da penicillin benzathine mai ambaliya, tare da abubuwa 1 zuwa 3, ya dangana da matakin cutar.  Penicillin ne kawai ke hana cutar da ta haihu.  An hana maganin da penicillin ta hanyar kawuna da kuma tsawaita kawuna na penicillin benzathine a ƙasashe da yawa, gami da ƙasashe masu babban kudin shiga, ƙasashe maras kudin shiga, da kuma ƙasashe da ke da matsakaicin kudin shiga.

**Alamun cuta:** Mutane da yawa da ke da cutar Syphilis ba sa nuna alamun cuta ko kuma ba sa jin alamun cuta.  Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar Syphilis na iya zama shekaru da yawa kuma ta kasance a matsayin daban-daban.  Yaduwar jima'i yawanci ta faru a matsayin farko, wato har zuwa shekaru 2 bayan kamuwa da cuta.  A lokacin matsayin farko (cutar Syphilis ta farko), wanda ya ɗauki tsawon kwanaki 21, wataƙi mai duhu, mara maɗaukicin zafi, galibi mai zagaye (chancre) ke bayyana a wurin da aka shiga (tuntuɓa), galibi a cikin mahaifa, maza, ko anus (amma hakan na iya zama a waje da mahaifa) kuma na iya zama mara lura.  Wataƙi chancre na iya warƙewa da ko ba da magani ba cikin kwanaki 3 zuwa 10.  Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar na iya tserewa zuwa matsayin na biyu.  Cutar Syphilis ta biyu ta bambanta da ciwon kai wanda na iya bambanta sosai kuma ya shimaka sauran cuta ko cuta mara cuta, amma ta bambanta ta hanyar tasiri akan ƙafa da ƙwarƙwarar jiki.  Cigon bai zama mai zafi ba kuma na iya zama ƙanƙanta sosai har an bar shi.  A cikin wurare masu zafi da sanyi na jiki, kamar anus da labia, ƙuraƙuraɓe masu farin duwatsu ko launin abu mai duwatsu na iya haɓaka a wurin chancre na farko (condyloma lata).  Alamun cuta da alama na cutar Syphilis ta biyu suna warƙewa ta atomatik, har ma ba da magani ba.  Idan ba a yi magani ba, matsayin ɓoye ya fara.

---

**Notes on the Translation & Potential Refinements:**

*   **Technical Terms:** I've tried to use the most common and understandable Hausa terms for medical concepts.  "STI" is translated as "Cutar da ke yaduwa ta hanyar jima'i" (disease that spreads through sexual contact). "ABOs" is translated as "abubuwan da suka fiye da yawa a lokacin haihuwa" (things that are more common during childbirth).
*   **Clarity and Flow:** I've restructured some sentences to improve readability in Hausa.  Hausa sentence structure can sometimes differ from English.
*   **Cultural Sensitivity:** The language is neutral and avoids potentially stigmatizing terms.
*   **Verification:** **Crucially, this translation *needs* to be reviewed by a native Hausa speaker with medical expertise.**  Medical terminology is very precise, and even small errors can have significant consequences.
*   **Regional Variations:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form, but a specific region might have preferred terms.
*   **"Chancre" and "Condyloma Lata":** These terms are particularly challenging. I've used descriptive phrases, but a medical professional might have a more established Hausa term.
*   **Penicillin Benzathine:** I've kept the English term "penicillin benzathine" as it's likely the most recognizable form, but a Hausa equivalent should be researched and used if available.

translations.source: Latent syphilis presents no clinical symptoms or signs and the treatment is different from the early phase. After years or decades without treatment, neurological and cardiovascular diseases among others may occur. Treatment: Syphilis diagnosis is based on the person’s history, physical examination, laboratory testing and sometimes radiology, as symptoms are not common or noticeable. Identifying asymptomatic infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes, including congenital syphilis. Laboratory tests for syphilis include direct detection of T. pallidum or indirect methods such as serology. Rapid screening and diagnostic tests are also available and can provide results in less than 20 minutes, facilitating immediate treatment initiation. WHO recommends syphilis to be treated with injectable penicillin (benzathine penicillin G) with 1 or 3 doses, depending on the stage of the disease. WHO has detailed treatment guidelines for syphilis, and one specifically for the screening and treatment of syphilis in pregnancy. Congenital syphilis There are currently no diagnostic tests for congenital syphilis. All live or stillborn infants of women with syphilis should be examined for evidence of congenital syphilis. Live-born infants should be examined and tested at birth to define treatment requirement. When indicated, also at monthly intervals for 3 months until the infant’s serology are, and remain, negative, as maternal antibodies can be passively transmitted to the baby during pregnancy.
translations.reference: Irin wannan yanayi na cutar tinjere ba shi da wasu alamomi, sannan maganinsa ya bambanta da na lokacin da ya fara. Idan aka ɗauki shekaru ba tare da yin magani ba, yakan haifar da matsalar ƙwaƙwalwa da shanyewar ɓarin jiki da sauransu. Magani: Maganin cutar tinjere ya danganta ne da tarihin mutum da kallon sa a zahiri da gwaji da kuma ɗaukar hoto a wasu lokutan, domin kuwa alamomin ba ɗaya ba ne ko muma ba a gane su. Gano cuta ta hanyar gwaji da kuma yin magani zai hana yaɗuwar cutar da kuma haifar da mutuwar jariri a yayin haihuwa, wanda ya haɗa da nau'in tinjeren da ake ɗauka a yayin haihuwa. Gwajin cutar tinjere ya qunshi gano wurin kai-tsaye ko kuma ta hanyar kaikaice, wadda ta haɗa da ɗaukar jini. Yawan dubawa da kuma gwaji shi ma ka iya ba da sakamako a ƙasa da minti 20, wanda hakan kan taimaka wajen yin magani nan take a farkon cutar. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da yin maganin tinjere ta amfani da allurar fenicilin, ta hanyar yin allura biyu zuwa 3, ya danganta da matakin cutar. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta ƙarin bayani game da matakan magance cutar tinjere, inda ta fayyace wanda za a duba da kuma maganin tinjere a yayin da ake da juna biyu. Cutar tinjeren da ake ɗauka yayin haihuwa A yanzu babu wani gwaji na cutar tinjere da ake ɗauka a yayin haihuwa. Duk rayayyun jarirai da waɗanda suka mutu yayin haihuwa sakamakon cutar tinjere ya kamata duba su ko suna da cutar da ake ɗauka yayin haihuwa. Ya kamata a duba tare da gwajin jariran da suke raye a yayin da aka haife su domin fayyace irin maganin da suke buƙata. A yayin da aka tabbatar da cutar, ya kamata duk bayan wata 3 a riƙa ɗaukar jini , sannan a uwar za ta ci gaba da shan magunguna a lokacin da take da juna har sai cutar ta tafi.

translations.source: Taeniasis and cysticercosis Overview: Infection with the tapeworm Taenia solium can result in two distinct conditions: taeniasis and cysticercosis. Taeniasis is the intestinal infection with the tapeworm and it occurs when a person eats raw or undercooked, infected pork. Taeniasis has no major impact on human health. However, tapeworm eggs pass in the faeces of the tapeworm carrier and in the absence of a proper sanitation may contaminate the environment. While tapeworm eggs are infective for pigs, T. solium eggs may also infect humans if they are ingested by a person (via the fecal-oral route, or by ingesting contaminated food or water). Ingestion of tapeworm eggs causes infection with the larval parasite in the tissues such as muscles, skin, eyes and the central nervous system (human cysticercosis), with possible devastating effects on health. When cysts develop in the brain, the condition is referred to as neurocysticercosis. Symptoms: Taeniasis is usually characterized by mild and non-specific symptoms associated to an intestinal infection (abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhoea, etc.). These symptoms may continue until the tapeworm dies following treatment, otherwise it may live for years. For cysticercosis, the incubation period is variable, and infected people may remain asymptomatic for years. In some endemic regions, infected people may develop visible or palpable nodules (a small solid bump or node which is solid that can be detected by touch) beneath the skin. Neurocysticercosis is associated with a variety of signs and symptoms depending on the number, size, stage and location of the pathological changes as well as the host’s immune response and the parasite’s genotype, but it can also be clinically asymptomatic. Symptoms may include chronic headaches, blindness, seizures (epilepsy if they are recurrent), hydrocephalus, meningitis, dementia and symptoms caused by lesions occupying spaces of the central nervous system. Treatment: The treatment of taeniasis by Taenia solium is important to prevent neurocysticercosis and as a tool to assist in controlling or stopping the parasite transmission cycle. The treatment can be done on an individual bases, or as Mass Drug Administration depending on the local circumstances and the control approaches being implemented. Taeniasis can be treated using anthelmintics (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). In neurocysticercosis, since the destruction of cysts may lead to an inflammatory response, specialised treatment of active disease is required and may include long courses with high doses of anthelmintic, as well as supporting therapy with corticosteroids and/or anti-epileptic drugs, and possibly surgery. The dosage and the duration of treatment can vary greatly and depend mainly on the number, size, location and developmental stage of the cysts, their surrounding inflammatory edema, acuteness and severity of clinical symptoms or signs.
translations.reference: Cutar dauɗar ciki da ta cushewar ciki ƙarin bayani: cutar dauɗar ciki na samuwa ne sakamakon abubuwa guda biyu mabambanta: cushewar ciki da cushewar hanji. Cushewar hanji cuta ce ta dauɗar ciki, wadda take samuwa a laokacin da mutum ya ci zallar naman alade ko wanda ba a dafa ko kuma naman aladen da ke da cuta. Cutar cushewar ciki ba ta da wani tasiri a kan lafiya. Sai dai kashin mai dauɗar ciki wanda ba a tsafatace ba ka iya gurɓata muhalli. A yayin da ƙwayaƙwan mcijin ciki ba sa yi wa alade komai, T. solium eggs ka iya illata ɗan'adam, idan mutum bai haɗiyu ba ( ta hanyar baki ko gurɓataccen abinci ko ruwan sha). Rashin narkewar tsutsar jiki na haifar da cuta, inda za samu a cuta a sassan jiki kamar tsokar jiki da fata da idanu da kuma ƙwaƙwalwa, wanda hakan ka iya cutar da lafiya. A yayin da aka samu kumburi a ƙwaƙwalwa, ana kiran wannan yanayi da kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa,. Alamomi: Dauɗar ciki yawanci tana siffantuwa ne da rashin wasu tsayayyun alamomi waɗanda za a iya dangantawa da cutar hanji (ciwon ciki da jin amai da gudawa da sauransu). Waɗannan alamomi za su iya ci gaba har sai tsutsar ta mutu sakamakon shan magani, ko kuma ta ci gaba da rayuwa tsawon shekaru. Game da cutar cushewar ciki, lokacin yin ƙyanƙyansa kan bambanta, sannan kuma masu fama da matsalar za su ci gaba da kasancewa ba tare da wata alama ba tsawon shekaru. A wasu wuraren da suka fama da annoba, waɗanda suka kamu ka iya siffantuwa da wasu abubuwa da za a iya gani (abun da za iya taɓawa) a ƙasan fata. Kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na bayyan ne da alamomi iri-iri, ya danganta ga da adadi da girma da mataki da kuma wurin da cutar ta fito da kuma yadda garkuwar jiki ta bayar da kariya da ƙwayar halittar mai cutar, sai dai za ta iya kasancewa ba ta nuna wata alama ba. Alamomin wannan cuta za su iya kasncewa matsanancin ciwo kai da makanta da farfaɗiya da taruwar ruwa a ƙwaƙwalwa da zazzaɓi da cutar mantuwa da kum sauran alamomin da raunin ya fito a ƙwaƙwalwa ya haifar. Magani: Maganin dauɗar ciki na da muhimmanci wajen hana aukuwar cutar kumburi da jan ruwan ƙwaƙwalwa a matasayin wata hanya ta hana ko tsakayar da hana yaɗuwar ƙwayoyin cuta. Za a iya yin magani dangane da yanayin mutane daban-daban ko ta yawan shan magani bisa ga yanayi wuri da kuma hanyar dakatar da yaɗuwar cutar da ka yi amfani da ita. za a iya maganin cutar dauɗar ciki ta hanyar amfani da maganin macijin ciki. Game da matsalar kumburi da jan ruwan ƙwaƙwalwa, fashewar ruwan kan iya yi zafi, ana buƙatar magani cuta na musamman, wanda ka iya ɗaukar matakai masu tsayi da kuma shan maganin macijin ciki ko allura mai yawa da kuma sauran magungunan farfaɗiya da kuma yuwuwar yin aiki. Yawan magani da tsawon lokacin da za a ɗauka ana sha ya danganta da adadi da girma da wuri da kuma matakin kumburin da zafin kumburin da tsininsa da tsananinsa da kuma alamominsa.

Okay, here's a translation of the provided text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy, suitable for a general audience. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for refinement.

**Hausa Translation:**

**Taeniasis da Cysticercosis: Bayani**

Ƙaunace ta giwar naman shari Taenia solium na iya haifar da matsayin cuta biyu: taeniasis da cysticercosis. Taeniasis ita ce cutar da ke faruwa a cikin hanji ta amsar giwar naman shari, kuma ta faru ne lokacin da mutum ya ci nama mai gari ko mara jefa da aka cutar da shi da giwa. Taeniasis babu illa mai yawa ga lafiyar mutane. Duk da haka, jinsai na giwa suna fitowa a cikin jini na mai daukar giwa, kuma a cikin rashin tsaftar muhalli mai kyau, na iya cutar da yanayin. Jinsai na giwa suna iya cutar da piggi, amma jinsai na T. solium kuma na iya cutar da mutane idan sun sha su (ta hanyar hanyar fecal-oral, ko ta cin abinci ko ruwan da aka cutar da su). Sha na jinsai na giwa ya haifar da cuta da kwayoyin cuta a cikin jini, irin su zango, fata, ido da kuma tsarin haɓakawa na gaba (cysticercosis na mutane), tare da tasiri mai tsanani akan lafiya. Lokacin da ƙwayoyin cuta ke haɓaka a cikin kasuwar, yanayin an kira shi neurocysticercosis.

**Alamuran:**

Taeniasis yawanci ana iya gano ta ta alamuran da ke da alaƙa da cutar hanji (ɗaɗi a ciki, girgiza, diarrhea, da sauransu). Waɗannan alamun na iya ci gaba har zuwa lokacin da giwa ta mutu bayan jinya, in ba haka ba, na iya zama a cikin jiki na shekaru. Don cysticercosis, lokacin da cutar ke haɓaka na iya bambanta, kuma mutanen da suka kamu da cuta na iya zama ba su da alamun cuta na shekaru. A wasu yankuna inda cutar ke kasawa, mutanen da suka kamu da cuta na iya haɓaka ƙwayoyin da za su iya ganewa ko taɓawa ƙasa da fata. Neurocysticercosis yana da alaƙa da hanyoyin da dama da alamun cuta, dangana da adadi, girma, mataki da kuma wurin canje-canjen pathological, da kuma amsar jiki da kwayar cuta, amma kuma na iya zama ba da alamun cuta a gani. Alamun na iya haɗawa da ciwon kai na tsufa, lalɓaɓɓen ido, haɓakar fitsari (ƙwayoyin fitsari idan sun sake faruwa), hydrocephalus, meningitis, dementia da alamun cuta da suka haifar da cutar a cikin tsarin haɓakawa na gaba.

**Jinya:**

Jinyar taeniasis ta Taenia solium ta'ada da mahimmanci don hana neurocysticercosis kuma a matsayin kayan aiki don taimakon sarrafa ko dakatar da tsarin bugawar kwayar cuta. Jinya na iya yi akan mutane, ko a matsayin Gudanar da Kwayar Cutar ta Bashi, dangana da yanayin gida da hanyoyin sarrafa da ake aiwatarwa. Taeniasis na iya jinyewa ta amsar anthelmintic (Praziquantel, Niclosamide, Albendazole). A cikin neurocysticercosis, tun lokacin da kashewar ƙwayoyin cuta na iya haifar da amsar ciwo, jinyar cutar da ke aiki ta buƙata, kuma na iya haɗawa da hanyoyin dogo da babban adadi na anthelmintic, da kuma tallafin jinya da corticosteroids da / ko maganin fitsari, da kuma yiwuwa a yi aiki. Adadin da lokacin jinya na iya bambanta sosai, da kuma dogara ne a kan adadi, girma, wurin da matakin ci gaban ƙwayoyin cuta, ciwon da ke kewaye da su, tsanaki da tsanawarin alamun cuta ko alama.

---

translations.source: Tetanus Overview: Tetanus is a serious illness contracted through exposure to the spores of the bacterium, Clostridium tetani, which live in soil, saliva, dust and manure. The bacteria can enter the body through a deep cuts, wounds or burns affecting the nervous system. The infection leads to painful muscle contractions, particularly of the jaw and neck muscle, and is commonly known as “lockjaw”. People of all ages can get tetanus but the disease is particularly common and serious in newborn babies and their mothers when the mother is unprotected from tetanus by the vaccine, tetanus toxoid. Tetanus occurring during pregnancy or within 6 weeks of the end of pregnancy is called maternal tetanus, while tetanus occurring within the first 28 days of life is called neonatal tetanus. The disease remains an important public health problem in many parts of the world, but especially in low-income countries or districts, where immunization coverage is low and unclean birth practices are common. WHO estimates that in 2018 (the latest year for which estimates are available), 25 000 newborns died from neonatal tetanus, 88% reduction from the situation in 2000. Symptoms: Nearly all cases of tetanus occur in people who have never been vaccinated or in adults who have not kept up to date on their booster shots. Signs and symptoms of tetanus appear anytime from 3 to 21 days after tetanus bacteria enter the body through a wound. Most cases occur within 14 days. Symptoms can include: jaw cramping or the inability to open the mouth muscle spasms often in the back, abdomen and extremities sudden painful muscle spasms often triggered by sudden noises trouble swallowing seizures headache fever and sweating changes in blood pressure or fast heart rate. In neonatal tetanus, symptoms include muscle spasms, which are often preceded by the newborn’s inability to suck or breastfeed, and excessive crying. Tetanus is diagnosed on the basis of clinical features and does not require laboratory confirmation. Tetanus requires treatment in a medical facility, often in a referral hospital. People who recover from tetanus do not have natural immunity and can be infected again and therefore need to be immunized. Prevention: Tetanus can be prevented through immunization with tetanus-toxoid-containing vaccines (TTCV), which are included in routine immunization programmes globally and administered during antenatal care contacts.
translations.reference: Cutar tetanos ƙarin bayan: Ttetanos babbar cuta ce da ake ɗauka daga wasu ƙwayoyin halitta da ke rayuwa a cikin ƙasa da yawu da kuma taki. ƙwayar halittar na shiga jikin mutum ne ta hanyar wani yanka mai zurfi ko ciwo ko ƙonuwa da yake shafar ƙwaƙwalwa. Cutar kan haifar da ciwo a jiki, musamman muƙamuƙi da wuya, wanda aka fi sani da lockjaw. Kowane rukuni na mutane ka iya kamuwa da cutar tetanos, to amma cutar ta fi yawa da tsanani ga jariari da iyayensu, a yayin da uwar ba ta samu kari daga cutar ba ta hanyar allura,. Cutar tetanos da ta kama mai juna biya ko kuma mako 6 kafin haihuwa ana kiran ta da cutar tetano ta uwa, yayin da wadda yaro ya kamu da ita a lokacin da yake da kawana 28 ana kiran ta da tetanos ta lokacin haihuwa. Cutar tetanos na ɗaya daga cikin manyan cututtuka da ke addabar sassa daban-daban na duniya, musamman ƙasashe mara arziki, inda ba a samun wadatar kulawa da garkuwr jiki da yawan al'adun rashin zabta a yayin haihuwa. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta yi sashe a 2018 cewa (wadda ita ce shekara mafi ƙaranci da aka yi hasashen), kimanin jarirai 25,000 ne ke mutuwa bayan haihuwarsu sakamakon cutar tetanos, inda aka samu raguwar kaso 88% a 2000. Alamomi: Kusan dukkan matsalar cutar tetabos na furuwa ne ga mutanen da ba taɓa yi musu allura ko manyan da ba su sake yin allura bayan wadda suka yi a baya. Alamomin cutar tetanos kan iya bayyana kowane lokaci daga kwana 3 zuwa 21 da shigar ƙwayar cutar jikin mutum ta hanyar rauni da ya ji . Yawancin cutar na bayyana ne cikin kwana 21. Alamomin sun ƙunshi: ƙagewar muƙamuƙi da kasa buɗe baki ƙagewar jiki, musamman baya da ciki da tafin hannu da na ƙafa ƙagewar jiki da kuma jin zafi na faruwa ne sakamakon ƙara wahala wajen yin haɗiya suma ciwon kai zazzaɓi da zufa Sauyawar hawan jini ko kuma saurin bugawar zuciya. A tetanos ɗin lokacin haihuwa, alamomin kan haɗa da ƙagewar jiki, wanda yawanci ke gabatar kasa tsotsar nonon jariri da kuma yawan kuka. Ana tabbatar da cutar tetanos dangane da alamu ba tare da buƙatar yin gwaji ba. Cutar tetanos na buƙatar kulawar asibiti, musamman tura zuwa wani asibitin. Mutanen da suka samu sauƙi daga cutar tetanos ba su da garkuwar jiki ta halicci, sannan kuma za su iya sake kamuwa, don haka suna buƙatar riga-kafi. Kariya: Za a iya samun kariya daga cutar tetanos ta hanyar yin riga-kafi da alluaran da ke kashe ta, waɗanda ake amfani da su a lokacin shirin zagayen riga-kafi na duniya da yin ta a yayin da ake zuwa duba lafiyar juna-biyu.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a public health context. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for refinement.

**Tetanus: Bayanin Takaitacciya**

Tetanus babban cuta ce da ta farar nan ta hanyar shiga spores na kwayar cutar *Clostridium tetani*, wacce ke rayuwa a cikin ƙasa, tuƙunya, ƙura da magudanin dabbobi. Kwayar cuta na iya shiga jiki ta hanyar raunuka masu zurfi, ƙwayoyin jiki ko ƙonƙwarawa, wanda ke shafar tsarin haɓakar jiki. Cutar ta haifar da tsananin zubar da ƙwayoyin jiki, musamman a rafin baki da ƙwayoyin jiki na wuya, kuma ana kiran ta da “ƙulla rafi” (lockjaw). Mutane na duk shekaru za su iya kamuwa da tetanus, amma cutar ta fi yawa da tsanowar a jarirai mazaɓuwa da mahaifansu lokacin da mahaifin bai yi kiyaye-kiyaye da alluran rigakafin tetanus ba, alluran tetanus toxoid. Tetanus da ya faru yayin juna biyu ko a cikin makonni 6 da suka biyo bayan juna biyu an fi sani shi da cutar mahaifa, yayin da cutar da ta faru a cikin awanni 28 na farko na rayuwar jariri an fi sani shi da cutar jarirai. Cutar har yanzu babban matsala ce ta lafiya a duniya, musamman a kasashe da yankuna maras kudin da dama, inda an rage yawan allurar rigakafi da amsar haihuwa mara tsafta. WHO ta kiyasta cewa a shekarar 2018 (shekarar da aka samu sababbin kidayoyi), jarirai 25,000 suka mutu sakamakon cutar jarirai, wanda ya nuna raguwar kashi 88 bisa dari tun shekarar 2000.

**Alamar cuta:** Kusan dukkanin lamarin tetanus ya faru a mutanen da ba su da allura ko kuma manya da ba su ci gaba da allurar rigakafi. Alamomin da ke nuni da cutar na iya bayyana kusan tsakanin kwanaki 3 zuwa 21 bayan kwayar cutar ta shiga jiki ta hanyar rauni. Yawancin lamarin ya faru a cikin kwanaki 14. Alamar cuta na iya haɗawa da:

*   Tsananin zubar da ƙwayoyin jiki a rafin baki ko rashin iya bude baki
*   Zubar da ƙwayoyin jiki, galbaya a g baya, ƙirƙira da ƙwayuwar jiki
*   Zubar da ƙwayoyin jiki na tsanani, wanda sau da yawa ya faru bisa ga abubuwan da ke faruwa cikin sauri
*   Matsala a kan shan abinci
*   Tausayi
*   Tsananin kura da zubar da ruwan jiki
*   Canje-canje a cikin matsin lamba na jini ko saurin buga zuciya

A cutar jarirai, alamar cuta ta haɗa da zubar da ƙwayoyin jiki, wanda sau da yawa ya biyo bayan rashin iya shan nono ko shayarwa da nono, da ƙara zubar da kuka.

Ana gano cutar ta tetanus bisa ga alamomin da ke bayyana a jiki, ba tare da buƙatar tabbatar da cutar a asibiti ba. Tetanus yana buƙatar a yi magani a asibiti, galbaya a asibitin da ke karɓar marasa lafiya. Mutanen da suka warke daga cutar tetanus ba sa da kariya ta halita kuma za su iya kamuwa da cutar sake, don haka suna buƙatar allurar rigakafi.

**Yadda za a hana:** Za’a iya hana cutar tetanus ta hanyar allurar rigakafi da alluran rigakafin tetanus-toxoid (TTCV), wanda ke cikin shirye-shiryen allurar rigakafi a duniya kuma ana ba da shi a lokacin kula da mata da ke juna biyu.

translations.source: To be protected throughout life, WHO recommends that an individual receives 6 doses (3 primary plus 3 booster doses) of TTCV. The 3-dose primary series should begin as early as 6 weeks of age, with subsequent doses given with a minimum interval of 4 weeks between doses. The 3 booster doses should preferably be given during the second year of life (12–23 months), at 4–7 years of age, and at 9–15 years of age. Ideally, there should be at least 4 years between booster doses. There are many kinds of vaccines used to protect against tetanus: diphtheria and tetanus (DT) vaccinesdiphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis (whooping cough) (DTaP) vaccinestetanus and diphtheria (Td) vaccinestetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis (Tdap) vaccines. Neonatal tetanus can be prevented by immunizing women of reproductive age with TTCV, either during pregnancy or outside of pregnancy. Additionally, robust medical practices can also prevent tetanus disease including clean delivery and cord care during childbirth, and proper wound care for surgical and dental procedures.
translations.reference: Idan mutum ba ya so ya kamu da cutar har abada, hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayar da shawarar cewa, mutum ya riƙa yin allura da ke kashe tetanos sau 6 (na fari 3 da kuma riga-kafi) na alluran da kashe tetanos,. Alluran farko 3 a jere ya kamata a yi su, mako 6 da haihuwa, inda daga bisani bayan yin allurar da mako 4. An fi son yin riga-kafin ta 3 a shekara ta biyu bayan haihuwa (wata 12 zuwa 23) a shekara 4 zuwa 7 da kuma shekara 9 zuwa 15. An fi son a yi aƙalla shekara 4 a tsakanin alluran riga-kafin. Akwai allurai iri daban-daban da za a iya amfani da su wajen samun kariya daga cutar tetanos: allurar kashe tetatnos a lokacin yarinta da ta hana kawuwa da cutar tetanos da alluran hana tari. Za a iya kauce wa kamuwa da cutar tetanos ta lokacin haihuwa, ta hanyar yi wa mata da suka kai shekarun haihuwa riga-kafi da alluran kashe cutar tetanos kodai a lokacin da suke da juna biyu ko bayan haihuwa. Haka kuma, yawan kula da lafiya a-kai-a-kai ka iya hana kamuwa da cutar tetanos, wanda ya haɗa tsafta lokacin haihuwa da kula da lafiyar jariri yayin haihuwa da kula da rauni wajen yin tiyata da kuma aikin haƙori.

translations.source: Tick-borne encephalitis Overview: Tick-borne encephalitis (TBE) is an important cause of viral infections of the central nervous system in eastern, central, northern and increasingly western European countries, and in northern China, Mongolia, and the Russian Federation. Tick-borne encephalitis virus is a member of the family Flaviviridae. Approximately 10 000–12 000 clinical cases of tick-borne encephalitis are reported each year, but this figure is believed to be significantly lower than the actual total number of clinical cases. The vast majority of infections with the virus result from infected ticks, which often remain firmly attached to the skin for days. On rare occasions, infection can result from consumption of unpasteurized milk from infect goats, sheep or cows. People come in contact with the ticks during outdoor activities in forested areas up to an altitude of about 2000 meters. There is no direct person-to-person transmission. Symptoms: Most infections remain asymptomatic. In case of clinical illness, the incubation period for tick-borne encephalitis lasts 2–28 days (most commonly 7–14 days) and is followed by 1–8 days of general cold symptoms, such as fatigue, headache and general malaise, usually combined with fever of ≥38 °C. After an asymptomatic interval of 1–20 days up to 15% of patients experience a second phase of the disease characterized by fever frequently exceeding 40 °C and signs of central nervous system involvement, such as meningitis (e.g. fever, headache, and a stiff neck), encephalitis (e.g., drowsiness, confusion, and sensory disturbances), myelitis or radiculitis. Encephalitis developing during this second phase may result in paralysis, permanent sequelae or death. About 1% of cases with neurological pathologies may die; higher fatality rates have been reported from the Russian federation, which may be related to a different virus subtype. Severity of illness increases with age of the patient, but fatalities have been reported from all age groups. There is no specific treatment for tick-borne encephalitis. Prevention: People can protect themselves from ticks by wearing appropriate clothing, including long trousers and closed footwear, when hiking or camping in countries or areas at risk. The whole body should be inspected daily and attached ticks removed as soon as possible. The consumption of unpasteurized dairy products should also be avoided in those areas. Immunization offers the most effective protection. Currently, there are 4 widely used vaccines of assured quality: FSME-Immun and Encepur, manufactured in Austria and Germany respectively, and based on European strains of the virus; and TBE-Moscow and EnceVir, manufactured in the Russian Federation and based on Far-Eastern strains. The 4 vaccines are considered to be safe and effective. In areas where the disease is highly endemic, WHO recommends that vaccination be offered to all age groups, including children. Ticks also transmit Borreliosis (Lyme disease), which is a bacterial infection.
translations.reference: Cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa ƙarin bayani: Cutar ƙwaƙwalwa na ɗaya daga cikin muhimman abubuwan da suke haifar da cuta a ƙwaƙwalwa a gabashi da tsakiya da arewaci kuma yake ci gaba ƙaruwa yammacin ƙasashen Turai, sannan kuma a arwacin China da Mongolia da Ttarayyar Rasha. Nau'in ƙwayar wannan cuta na cikin dangin ƙwayoyin cuta na Filabibiraidi. Kimanin mutane 10,000 zuwa 12,000 ke kamuwa da cutar ƙwaƙwalwa a duk shekara, amma an yi imanin wannan adadi bai kai ainihin adadin da ake samu ba. Mafi yawan wannan cuta da ƙwayar cutar na samuwa ne sakamakon ticks da ya kamu da cuta, wanda yawanci yake kasancewa a jikin fata tsawon kwanaki. A wasu lokutan, ana kamuwa da cutar ta hanyar shan nonon akuya ko tunkiya ko saniya mai cuta da aka sha ba tare da an dafa ba. Mutane kan kamu da cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa a yayin mu'amala a wuraren da suke da daji da nisansa ya kai kimanin mita 2000. Mutane ba su yaɗa cutar a junansu. Alamomi: Yawanci kamuwa da cutar ba ya nuna alama. cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na ɗaukar kwana 2 zuwa 28 kafin ta fara (Yawanci kwana 7 zuwa 14) sannan kuma da kwana 1 zuwa 8 wanda shi ne alama ta bai-ɗaya, inda alamomi irin su yawan gajiya da ciwon kai da rashin jin daɗin jiki, wanda ya wanci ya haɗa da zazzaɓi wanda zafinsa ya kai 38C. Bayan rashin nuna alama na kwana 1 zuwa 20, kusan kaso 15% na marasa lafiyar sukan fuskanci mataki na biyu na cutar, wanda ake yawan yin zazzaɓi da zafinsa ya wuce 40C da kuma nuna alamun cutar, kamar rashin jin ɗin jiki (da ya haɗa da zazzaɓi da ciwon kai ƙagewar wuya) da sakwarkwacewar ƙwaƙwalwa (kamar yawan bacci da rikicewa da rikicewar hanyoyin hankali) da zafin laka. Zafin ƙwaƙwalwa ka iya haifar da shanyewar ɓarin jiki da wata cutar ko ma mutuwa. Kimanin kaso 1% na matsalar da shafi ƙwaƙwalwa na iya gushewa, inda aka samu rahoton yawan mutuwa a Tarayyar Rasha, wanda za a iya dangantawa da ƙwayoyin cuta iri-iri. Ttsananin cutar na ƙaruwa, amma an samu rahoton samun mace-mace a kowane rukunin shekara. Babu wani takamaiman maganin kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa. Kariya: Mutane za iya samun kariya daga cutar tufafin ƙwaƙwalwa ta hanyar saka tufafin da ya dace, wanda ya haɗa da wando da safa, a yayin zuwa ko zama a ƙasashe ko wuraren da ke fuskantar barazana. Ya kamata a riƙa duba jiki kullum sannan a cire kumburin nan da nan. Ya kamata a guji shan madarar dabbar da ta kamu ba tare da an dafa a waɗannan wwuraren. Riga-kafi ya fi komai saurin yin maganin cutar. A yanzu akwai allurai 4 da suke da inganci yin maganin cutar: Sun haɗa da allurar FSME-Immun da Encepu, waɗanda ake yi a Austria da Germany, sannan kuma dangane da ƙarfin ƙwayar cutar a Turai da TBE-Moscow da kuma EnceVir, waɗanda da ake yin su a Tarayyar Rasha, sannan dangane da ƙarfinta a can gabashi. Ana ganin allurai 4 sun fi inganci da aminci. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayar da shawarar yin alluran ga kowane rukuni na shekara, da ya haɗa da yara a wuraren da cutar ta zama annoba. Cutar kumburin ƙwaƙwalwa na haifar da cutar Borreliosis, wadda ƙwayar cuta ke haifarwa.

Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document, aiming for clarity and accuracy while considering the target audience. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices and potential areas for refinement.

**Cut-borne Encephalitis (TBE) - Bayanin Takaitawa**

Cut-borne encephalitis (TBE) babban cuta ce ta kwayoyin cutar da ke shafar tsarin tsinkayar jiki a kasashen Gabas, Tsakiya, Arewa, da kuma yawan kasashen Yammacin Turai, da kuma a Arewacin China, Mongolia, da kuma Jamhuriyar Rasha. Virus ɗin cutar cut-borne encephalitis ya kasu karkashin iyali mai suna Flaviviridae. Kusan shekara-shekara akasƙantar shekara 10,000 zuwa 12,000 lamuran cutar cut-borne encephalitis ke a bayyana, amma an hasasƙa cewa wannan adadi ya ƙasa da adadin gaske na yawan cutar. Babban yawan cutar da wannan virus ke haifarwa ta fito ne ta ticks (cutacce-cutacce), waɗanda sau da yawa suna jinin jikin mutum tsawon sa'o da yawu. A wasu lokuta na kaka, cutar na iya fito ta cin abinci mai dumi mara aiki (unpasteurized) daga dabbobin gona irin su karkara, shafi, ko kuma guguwa. Mutane suna shakuwar da wannan ticks a lokacin ayyukan waje a cikin sarakunan daji har zuwa tsayin hazaƙa na kusan mita 2000. Ba ta yiwuwa yaduwar cutar daga mutum zuwa mutum.

**Alamar cuta:**

Babban yawan cutar ba ta bayyana ba (asymptomatic). Idan mutum ya kamu da cuta, tsawon lokacin da cutar ke haɓaka (incubation period) don cutar cut-borne encephalitis na tsakanin kwanaki 2 zuwa 28 (kwanaki 7 zuwa 14 mafi yawan lokaci) sannan ta biyo da kwanaki 1 zuwa 8 na alamomin zubar da jini, irin su gajiya, ciwon kai, da rashin lafi'a, galibi tare da zubar da jini mai girma ≥38 °C. Bayan tsawon lokaci mara alamun cuta na kwanaki 1 zuwa 20, kusan 15% na mutane suna fuskantar mataki na biyu na cutar, wanda ke hasashen zubar da jini wanda sau da yawa ya wuce 40 °C da alamomin shafar tsarin tsinkayar jiki, irin su meningitis (misali, zubar da jini, ciwon kai, da tsananin wuya), encephalitis (misali, tsoro, rikici, da cutar da jinin), myelitis ko radiculitis. Encephalitis da ke faruwa a wannan mataki na biyu na iya haifar da lalaci, sakamakwan cuta na dindindin, ko mutuwar. Kusan 1% na cutar da ke da matsalar tsinkayar jiki suna mutuwa; an bayar da rahoton kasashe mafi yawan mutuwar a Jamhuriyar Rasha, wanda kuma na iya zama dangantaka da bambancin virus. Tsanawarin cuta ya ƙara da shekarar mutum, amma an bayar da rahoton mutuwar daga duk shekarun. Ba akwai magani na musamman don cutar cut-borne encephalitis.

**Yiwuwar hana cuta:**
